En: Is this the last dream?
Zh: 这是最后一个梦境吗？

En: No. This is the one before that. We'll just keep cycling it for you, if you don't mind. As long as we can. Spin it like black yarn.
Zh: 不。这是在它之前的那一个。如果你不介意的话，我们会继续为你循环……只要我们可以的话。像黑色线圈一样，不断旋转。

En: Enjoy it while it lasts.
Zh: 趁它还在的时候，好好享受吧。

En: Go.
Zh: 走吧。

En: But I've been bad. I haven't earned this.
Zh: 但我一直表现地很糟糕。这不是我应得的。

En: No, you haven't. You've just *been*.
Zh: 不，你没有。你刚刚*有过*。

En: I've heard this song before.
Zh: 我之前听过这首歌。

En: Sing along -- in silent communion.
Zh: 在无声的交流中——不断歌唱。

En: This is greatest hits material. Black tape spinning and spinning and spinning... You finally tired yourself. Cornered the flicker of your mind and extinguished it.
Zh: 这是最棒的精选集。黑色的磁带不断旋转着，旋转着……你终于累了。将你心灵的闪光逼入绝境，然后掐灭它。

En: For now -- a little while -- you can...
Zh: 目前——这一会儿——你可以……

En: How many days have I been in Martinaise already...
Zh: 我已经在马丁内斯待了多少天……

En: There are no days here. There are no weeks. Just black tape spinning. On repeat. Until the end.
Zh: 这里没有日子。这里没有星期。只有黑色的磁带在旋转。循环往复。直到尽头。

En: Blackness, blackness, blackness. The ultimate disco. The ruins of your life behind you, still smouldering. Ashes rise. But you're not looking.
Zh: 黑暗，黑暗，黑暗。终极的迪斯科。生活的废墟就躺在你身后，还在缓慢地燃烧着。灰尘扬起。但你却没有回头去看。

En: (Sleep. Without words or images.)
Zh: （睡觉。没有语言或者图像。）

En: When the pictograms and the hieroglyphs of the world return, they seem silent somehow. The alarm rings quietly too. You're ready.
Zh: 当世界里的象形符号和文字回归之时，它们似乎变得有些沉默。就连闹钟铃声也变得异常安静。你已经准备好了。

En: Ready -- but something is coming. It always is.
Zh: 准备好——但是有什么要来了。总是这样。

En: Oh god...
Zh: 天啦……

En: It's easier, this time, drifting off. Your head has found a comfortable indent in the pillow. Your legs and your torso feel like lead weights sinking to the bottom of the sea, until they're suddenly light...
Zh: 这次简单一些，你就这么迷迷糊糊的睡了过去。你的脑袋在枕头里找到了一个舒服的位置。腿和躯干就像铅坠一样沉入深深的海底，直到一缕光线突然出现……

En: This respite -- you've earned it, brother. Bask in the darkness. Let it swallow you up and swivel you around while you forget everything you've managed to remember...
Zh: 休息——这是你应得的，兄弟。沐浴在黑暗里。它将你吞没，在你周围盘旋，而你……忘记了曾经记得的一切……

En: Thank you, darkness. Thank you.
Zh: 谢谢你，黑暗。谢谢。

En: You're welcome, Harry-boy. You earned it.
Zh: 不用客气，小哈里。这是你应得的。

En: (Fall into a deep, uninterrupted sleep.)
Zh: （深入深层的、不间断的睡眠。）

En: After centuries of darkness, the alarm rings -- but what's this? You *actually* feel rested. There's no time to cuddle with your pillow, however, or as much as shiver from the cold. The world awaits.
Zh: 仿佛经历了几个世纪的黑暗，闹钟响了——这是怎么回事？你*确实*感觉休息得很好。不过没时间跟你的枕头缠绵，或者是在寒冷中慑慑发抖了。世界在等着你。

En: [Open your eyes.]
Zh: [睁开双眼。]

En: This person also *forced* the drinks on you.
Zh: 这个人也在*强迫*你喝酒。

En: Congratulations, you smashed the window with your own shoe. Now you only have one. If you're lucky you can still find the other on the balcony outside. The door to it should be outside your room.
Zh: 恭喜，你用自己的鞋砸碎了窗户。现在你只剩下一只。如果走运的话，你还能在外面的阳台上找到另外一只。那扇门应该在你的房间外面。

En: Wait, what am I doing?
Zh: 等等，我在做什么？

En: What did this then?
Zh: 这是怎么回事？

En: Maybe it wasn't me?
Zh: 也许不是我？

En: You mean someone else took your shoe off and smashed the window with it?
Zh: 你的意思是别人拿了你的鞋，然后用它砸碎了窗户？

En: The shards face outward. Whatever broke this window came from the inside.
Zh: 碎片是朝外的。不管是谁砸碎了这扇窗户，一定是从里面下的手。

En: A fine web of scarring covers the back of your right hand, but none of it is recent.
Zh: 你的右手背上覆盖着一层疤痕织成的细网，但是没有一个是最近留下的。

En: More likely a projectile than a held object. There are no fragments on the floor from pulling a tool back in after impact.
Zh: 比起手持东西砸窗户，看起来更像是把物体呈抛射状扔出去造成的。地板上没有冲击后把工具朝里拉而形成的碎片。

En: It is too large for a bullet yet too small for a piece of furniture. You're looking for something heavy and larger than your fist.
Zh: 对于子弹来说太大了，对于家具来说又太小。你在寻找某样比自己的拳头更大更重的东西。

En: The single green shoe you found fits the hole almost as well as your foot. It would have also been heavy enough, if thrown with force.
Zh: 你找到的那只绿鞋符合破洞的大小——还有你的脚。如果扔的特别用力，也能产生足够的重量。

En: Assess the size of the impact.
Zh: 评估冲击的尺寸。

En: Like the green shoe that's on the hat rack in the corner, which -- coincidentally -- is missing its friend.
Zh: 比如角落里衣帽架上的那只绿鞋，巧合的是——它正在想念自己的朋友。

En: Something you've done before.
Zh: 你之前做过的事。

En: Did I break it with my own hands? (Look at them.)
Zh: 我用手把它砸碎的吗？（看着自己的双手。）

En: The window stands broken in its frame. Cold wind blows in.
Zh: 破碎的窗户仍然站立在窗框里。冷风从破洞中吹了进来。

En: Look out.
Zh: 看向外面。

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

En: Assess the damage.
Zh: 评估受损情况。

En: Has been here a while.
Zh: 已经在这里有一会儿了。

En: The lights are on!
Zh: 灯打开了！

En: What do you mean *assess the damage*? How would you do that? What are you even trying to do?
Zh: 你说*评估受损情况*是什么意思？你打算怎么做？话说回来，你到底打算做什么？

En: I don't need it. I don't need *anyone*.
Zh: 我不需要它。我不要*任何人*。

En: I should go and get that shoe.
Zh: 我应该去把鞋拿回来。

En: The window agrees. Its cracked smile is cold and sparkly.
Zh: 窗户同意了。它破碎的微笑冰冷而耀眼。

En: A cool wind gushes in. Your toes curl up from the cold.
Zh: 一阵冷风涌了进来。你的脚趾因为寒冷而蜷缩起来。

En: You see some lights shimmering outside, but it's difficult to make out the outlines of the buildings below -- dark phantoms with many tiny eyes chaotically arranged and not looking at you.
Zh: 你看见外面有灯光在闪烁，但是很难辨认出下面建筑的轮廓——长着无数只小眼的黑色幻影杂乱地排列着，并没有看着你的方向。

En: The morning light hurts your eyes. It's hazy, but you see the ocean and some war-torn buildings...
Zh: 清晨的阳光刺伤了你的眼睛。朦胧中，你看见一片大海和饱受战火摧残的建筑……

En: The shoe you found out on the balcony fits the hole almost as well as your foot. It would have also been heavy enough, if thrown with force.
Zh: 你在阳台上找到的那只绿鞋符合破洞的大小——还有你的脚。如果扔的特别用力，也能产生足够的重量。

En: Congratulations, you smashed the window with your own shoe.
Zh: 恭喜，你用自己的鞋子砸碎了窗户。

En: This person also *forced* the drinks on you.
Zh: 这个人也在*强迫*你喝酒。

En: You mean someone else took your shoe off and smashed the window with it?
Zh: 你的意思是别人拿了你的鞋，然后用它砸碎了窗户？

En: Maybe it wasn't me?
Zh: 也许不是我？

En: I'm sure I had a good reason for it. Maybe I was trying to hit someone?
Zh: 我肯定自己这么做是有充足理由的。也许我是想打中某个人？

En: What a stupid thing to do.
Zh: 真是件愚蠢的事情。

En: And maybe, just maybe, you succeeded. We'll never know.
Zh: 也许，只是也许，你成功了。我们永远也不会知道。

En: Or maybe you were trying to smash your own reflection in the windowpane?
Zh: 或者你是想用它砸碎窗户上自己的倒影？

En: Pretty much. But, hey, at least you found your shoe.
Zh: 差不多吧。不过，至少你找到自己的鞋了。

En: Not that it will keep you warm at night. Brrr.
Zh: 并不是说这样就能让你拥有一个温暖的夜。呵。

En: Congratulations, you smashed the window with your own shoe. That's why you only have one. If you're lucky, you might still find the other on the balcony outside. The door to it should be outside your room.
Zh: 恭喜，你用自己的鞋砸碎了窗户。所以现在只剩下一只鞋。如果走运的话，你还能在外面的阳台上找到另外一只。那扇门应该在你的房间外面。

En: Congratulations, you smashed the window with your own shoe. Now you only have one. If you're lucky, you can still find the other on the balcony outside. The door to it should be outside your room.
Zh: 恭喜，你用自己的鞋砸碎了窗户。现在只剩下一只鞋了。如果走运的话，你还能在外面的阳台上找到另外一只。那扇门应该在你的房间外面。

En: The shoe you found out on the balcony fits the hole almost as well as your foot. It's similar to the green shoe that's on the hat rack in the corner, which -- coincidentally -- is missing its friend.
Zh: 你在阳台上找到的那只绿鞋符合破洞的大小——还有你的脚。它跟角落里衣帽架上挂着的那只很相似，巧合的是——挂着的那只正在想念它的伙伴。

En: Congratulations, you smashed the window with your own shoe.
Zh: 恭喜，你用自己的鞋砸碎了窗户。

En: What style was that?
Zh: “那是什么风格？”

En: Final-style, he repeats. "You fucked everything up. Now Cuno's all you got. Terminal Cuno."
Zh: “终结风格，”他重复到。“你把一切都搞砸了。现在你只有坤诺了。终结者坤诺。”

En: Nix Gottlieb, station medic, throws a bag containing a small bullet into the medical waste disposer. Then he pops some caramel candy into his mouth and says: "Next." There's a line behind his door...
Zh: 尼克斯·戈特利布，警局的医师，把一个装着小子弹的袋子扔进了医疗废物处置机。接着，他往嘴里塞了些焦糖糖果，说道：“下一个。”他的门后有一排队伍……

En: What? He studies your expression. "You don't believe the Cuno? You don't believe the Cuno knows this shit? Fuck you, Cuno keeps tabs. Bitch is outta town."
Zh: “什么？”他研究着你的表情。“你不相信坤诺？你不知道坤诺知道这些破事？去死吧，坤诺一直在监视。婊子已经出城了。”

En: Thank god, okay, he's alive.
Zh: 谢天谢地，好吧，他还活着。

En: There were only ten people present at the fight. Ten times more than that is very unlikely.
Zh: 交火现场只有十个人。十倍以上是不太可能的。

En: If he did triage and left, you must be relatively stable.
Zh: 如果他确实做了验伤然后离开了，你肯定会相对稳定一些。

En: We're detecting *drouamine* in your bloodstream. It's a potent morphine-based painkiller. The good doctor must have given you some... It's gonna suck when it wears off.
Zh: 我们在你的血液里检测到*多巴宁*。这是一种以吗啡为基础的强效止痛药。好医生肯定给你用了一些……它消散之后肯定会很痛苦。

En: Ouch, ouch... The kid turns double for a second. Damn, that hurts. Breathe...
Zh: 哎哟，好痛……有那么一秒，男孩变成了两个人。该死，好痛。呼吸……

En: Yeah, that kid's taken a beating -- or ten -- from his dad. He has regard for a man who can walk after taking some damage.
Zh: 是啊，男孩被打过一次——或者是十次——他爸打的。他很尊重受了伤还能走的人。

En: You mean Garte?
Zh: “你是说加尔特？”

En: Yeah, fuckin' babybeard. Cleaned all your shit up. He's like your fuckin' mom now or something.
Zh: “是啊，那个该死的小胡子。把烂摊子全清理干净了。他妈的，现在他都快变成你的老母亲什么的了。”

En: He looks you in the eye and repeats: "Two days is *nothing* to the Cuno."
Zh: 他看着你的眼睛，重复到：“对于坤诺来说，两天根本*不算什么*。”

En: Titus is dead...?
Zh: “提图斯死了……？”

En: Yeah, fuckin' dead. Died in the hospital, I hear. Union's all weepy and shit... He gives you a nod of acknowledgement: "It's probably your fault."
Zh: “是啊，他妈的死了。我听说是死在了医院里。工会的人全都哭的眼泪汪汪什么的……”他点头表示确认：“这可能是你的错。”

En: It probably is... fucking butterfingers.
Zh: 可能是的……你这个该死的笨手笨脚的家伙。

En: It's the *fault* of those who *killed* him. Not you.
Zh: 这是*杀了*他的人的*错*。不是你的。

En: She escaped?
Zh: “她逃跑了？”

En: Who would have thought? Perhaps you should have *arrested* her?
Zh: 谁能想到呢？也许你应该*逮捕*她？

En: Do you know if Klaasje -- the blonde next door -- is really gone?
Zh: “你知不知道卡拉洁——隔壁那个金发女郎——她真走了吗？”

En: Yeah, she's way gone pig. Cuno's been here for two days and babybeard and you are the only fucks in the building.
Zh: ”是啊，她走得远远的了，猪头。坤诺在这里待了两天，这个地方只有你和小胡子两个人。”

En: Of course she's *really* gone, what did you think.
Zh: 她当然*真的*走了，你想什么呢。

En: Was nothin'. He tries to shake off the image. "Cuno's gonna go into a bag too. We all are."
Zh: “这没什么。”他试着摆脱那个画面。“坤诺也会被装进袋子里。我们都会的。”

En: That bag's on *you*. You could have done something, but you just stood there. Fuck...
Zh: 那个袋子应该算在*你*头上。你本来可以做点什么的，但你却只是站在那里。该死……

En: He's really been keeping tabs -- on you, the Hardies, even the company rep.
Zh: 他真的在监视——监视你，哈迪兄弟，甚至是公司代表。

En: Let's do this tango, pig, he thinks. Detective Pig and detective Cunn on the case. We bouncin'.
Zh: 我们行动吧，猪头，他想到。猪头警探和坤诺警探准备调查案件。我们开始吧。

En: Cunn and Pig? And you're picking him up on your cop-frequency too. This is... bad.
Zh: 坤诺和猪头？而且你还在警察频道提过他。这……不太妙啊。

En: Yeah, it probably is.
Zh: “是啊，有可能。”

En: The fuck Cuno?
Zh: “坤诺，你他妈怎么回事？”

En: Walls are full of holes in here, pig. Even Cuno knows that.
Zh: “这里的墙上全是洞，猪头。就连坤诺都知道这个。”

En: You want Cuno to be your yes-man, or you want me to tell it like it is? Walls are full of holes here, pig. Even Cuno knows that.
Zh: “你想让坤诺当个对你唯唯诺诺的人，还是你想让我实话实说？这里的墙上全是洞，猪头。就连坤诺都知道这个。”

En: There is no telling *when* it was made. He had a point there.
Zh: 谁也不知道这是什么*时候*造成的。他说的有道理。

En: He's genuinely impressed, but that's mostly to do with how scientific that percentage sounded.
Zh: 他真的被打动了，不过主要取决于这个百分比听起来有多科学。

En: A gust of wind blows in from the bay, the duraluminium box around you vibrates imperceptibly... a familiar cold, a red thread on the roof upstairs. Taut. Plucked like a string by the gust.
Zh: 一阵风从海湾吹来，你周围的杜拉铝盒子微微震动着……一种熟悉的寒冷，屋顶上的一根红线。逐渐拉紧。就像一根被狂风拨动的弦。

En: Also, it's just close enough to endure the walk.
Zh: 而且距离挺近的，走几步应该能忍得了。

En: You did mention doing more ballistics...
Zh: 你确实听过多做些弹道测试……

En: Ballistics. In Klaasje's room. Do it *properly*.
Zh: 弹道学。在卡拉洁的房间里。做得*恰当*一点。

En: You askin' Cuno to come along to your shit-show and you don't even know what to do? Fuckin' check your pig journal or something. C'mon...
Zh: “=你让坤诺加入你的狂欢，结果你居然不知道该怎么做？他妈的，看看你的日志或者什么的啊。真是服了……”

En: Nix Fucklieb, I think he was called, he says trying to remember the situation. "Said he was a doctor. Then fucked off and told me to phone him if you shit yourself."
Zh: “我想他好像叫尼克斯·什么列布，”他尝试回忆当时的情景。“说自己是个医生。然后他妈的就走了，还说如果你大便失禁的话就给他打电话。”

En: Two days, he says indifferently. "Cuno's been out longer, sleepin' off the speed train. Two days is nothing."
Zh: “两天，”他冷漠地开了口。“坤诺没嗑思必得的时间都比这个长。两天算不上什么。”

En: How long was I out?
Zh: “我昏迷多久了？”

En: You said half the town is dead?
Zh: “你说城里一半的人都死了？”

En: You said thousands are dead?
Zh: “你说几千人死了？”

En: Yeah, it was a fucking massacre, Cuno says with a wide grin. "You and Cuno are the only ones left here."
Zh: “是啊，他妈的就是一场大屠杀，”坤诺大大地裂开嘴笑了。“你和坤诺是唯一剩下来的人。”

En: Relax, the kid is just messing with you. You didn't actually get *thousands* of people killed.
Zh: 放松，这小孩只是在戏弄你。你不是真的害死了*上千人*。

En: What happened to the others?
Zh: “那其他人呢？”

En: What do you think I should do now, Cuno?
Zh: “你觉得我现在应该怎么办，坤诺？”

En: Titus died, he says indifferently. "Some of his goons too. The whole fucking harbour is in lockdown right now. Even Cuno can't get in."
Zh: “提图斯死了，”他冷漠地说道。“他有些手下也死了。现在整个港口都他妈封禁了。连坤诺都进不去。”

En: Some of those Union goons got fucked, he says pointing at the door. "Now the whole harbour is in lockdown. Even Cuno can't get in there."
Zh: “有些工会的傻瓜死了，”他指着门说道。“现在整个港口都他妈封禁了。连坤诺都进不去。”

En: Evrart probably used this armed altercation as an excuse to completely barricade himself in the harbour and cut off all communications with the outside world.
Zh: 艾弗拉特可能会用这次武装争辩作为把自己完全关在港口的借口，切断一起与外界的联系。

En: Do you know if Klaasje -- the blonde next door -- is alright?
Zh: “你知不知道卡拉洁——隔壁那个金发女郎——她还好吗？”

En: Do you know if Joyce -- the company lady with the boat -- is alright?
Zh: “你知不知道，乔伊斯——就是船上那个公司的女代表——她还好吗？”

En: Is Titus alright?
Zh: “提图斯还好吗？”

En: Did Elizabeth -- the gardener -- survive?
Zh: “伊丽莎白——那个园丁——还活着吗？”

En: No. The kid suddenly looks very young and small. "She was dead when the Union doctor arrived. Cuno saw them put her in a bag."
Zh: “没有。”孩子突然显得年轻又弱小。“工会医生赶到的时候，她已经死了。坤诺看见他们把她装进了一个袋子里。”

En: Thanks for telling me, Cuno. (Conclude.)
Zh: “谢谢你告诉我实情，坤诺。”（总结。）

En: No problem. Cuno shares the info.
Zh: “没问题。坤诺愿意分享信息的。”

En: She's gone, pig. Cuno saw her take off before you started all that violent shit. Had a suitcase and shit.
Zh: “她走了，猪头。在你开始那场该死的骚动之前，坤诺看见她离开了。拿着个行李箱还有其他什么鬼东西。”

En: He's telling the truth.
Zh: 他说的是实话。

En: Doesn't sound like she's planning to come back.
Zh: 听起来她并没有打算回来。

En: Tough he may be, but this image left a mark.
Zh: 虽然他很坚强，但是那副光景还是打下了一个深深的烙印。

En: The whole harbour is in lockdown?
Zh: “整个港口都封闭了？”

En: Yeah, that's what Cuno said. No one goes in or out. Shit's paranoid now.
Zh: “是啊，坤诺不是说过了吗。任何人都不许进出。现在就像偏执狂一样。”

En: Rich bitch? Yeah, probably. Boat's gone. Cuno'd be fucking *fine* too if Cuno had a boat...
Zh: “那个有钱的婊子？是啊，也许吧。船不在了。如果坤诺有船的话，肯定也*他妈*会很好的……”

En: The big fuckhole? There's a flash of respect on his freckled face. "Yeah, he's drinking downstairs. Cuno's not into that."
Zh: “那个大混球？”他那张布满雀斑的脸上闪过一丝尊敬的意味。“是啊，他在楼下喝酒。坤诺不喜欢那个。”

En: You don't... know?
Zh: “你……不知道？”

En: The fuck you askin' Cuno for? He seems annoyed somehow. "How would Cuno know? Cuno's fucking twelve!"
Zh: “你他妈问坤诺干嘛？”他好像有些恼怒。“坤诺怎么会知道？坤诺他妈只有12岁。”

En: But... I don't know either.
Zh: “但是……我也不知道。”

En: Relax, Cuno -- I know what to do.
Zh: “放松点，坤诺——我知道该怎么做。”

En: Tough shit, pig. He crosses his arms. "All Cuno knows is the harbour is in lockdown, town's fucked now. Half the Hardie bitches are dead and even your company bitch left."
Zh: “真他妈难，猪头。”他抱起胳膊。“坤诺只知道港口已经封闭了，整个城市都他妈被搞乱了。一半的哈迪娘炮死了，就连公司那个婊子也走了。”

En: Oh really? He doesn't seem to believe you. "You can't get to that fat fuck Evrart anymore, 'cause the harbour's locked down. Half the Hardie bitches are dead and your company bitch sailed off."
Zh: “哦，真的吗？”他似乎不太相信你。“你再也见不到那个死胖子艾弗拉特了，因为港口完全封闭了。一半的哈迪娘炮死了，就连公司那个婊子也走了。”

En: Cuno thinks you're fucked, he concludes with a solemn nod. "But I can help you. What'cha got? Bounce that shit off Cuno."
Zh: “坤诺觉得你搞砸了，”他郑重地点了点头。“但是我能帮你。你有什么打算？跟坤诺说说。”

En: The fucking *May bells*, Cuno, the flowers!
Zh: “那个该死的*铃兰*，坤诺，那些花。”

En: Yeah? What? What bells?
Zh: “哈？什么？什么铃铛？”

En: No, Cuno -- *somehow* this *is* connected to the case.
Zh: “不，坤诺——这个*确实*在*某种程度上*与案子有关联。”

En: He's wrong! What does he even know?!
Zh: 他错了！他能知道什么？！

En: Yeah? What? What bells?
Zh: “哈？什么？什么铃铛？”

En: (Yank it out and show the dried flower, while it falls to pieces.) "This flower, Cuno!"
Zh: （把它拿出来，亮出支离破碎的干花。）“这朵花，坤诺！”

En: They were on the roof. I did not... I did not catch them. Fucking butterfingers...
Zh: “它们之前就在屋顶上。我没有……我没有抓到它们。手脚真他妈的太笨了……”

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Sure, pig. Sure. He shakes his head. "You better have more than some fuckin' roses if you wanna bust this."
Zh: “当然了，猪头。当然。”他摇摇头。“如果你想突击搜查的话，最好别只有这几朵破玫瑰就行。”

En: Yeah that sounds real to Cuno. Forensics-shit. True crime shit. The kid punches his palm. "Let's check out some crime scenes and assess shit. Pig-style! Anything else?"
Zh: “这在坤诺听起来还差不多。取证什么的。真正的犯罪。”男孩用拳头砸向自己的手掌。“我们去犯罪现场看看，评估一下情况。就按猪头的风格来！还有其他的吗？”

En: Huh? The kid appears to be thinking. "That could've been there for years. Cuno thinks it's a dead end."
Zh: “哈？”男孩好像在思考。“那玩意可能在那里好多年了。坤诺觉得这是个死胡同。”

En: There are fuckin' footprints *everywhere*, pig. Pigs are too into this footprints shit... He shakes his head. "Cuno just saw footprints outside on the *sidewalk*."
Zh: “他妈的*到处*都有脚印，猪头。猪头太沉迷脚印了，都是狗屁……”他摇摇头。“坤诺只看到外面*人行道*上的脚印。”

En: There were some footprints in the dust in the room behind Klaasje's...
Zh: “卡拉洁背后房间里有一些灰扑扑的脚印……”

En: There's a... 28% possibility the victim was shot from a distance.
Zh: “大概有……28%的可能，被害人是从远处被击中的。”

En: There was a hole in Klaasje's wall -- someone was checking her out. Peeping.
Zh: “卡拉洁的墙上有个洞——有人在调查她。偷窥。”

En: There's something creeping around out there. I sense it.
Zh: “外面有些鬼鬼祟祟的东西。我能感觉到。”

En: The miracle hasn't happened yet. It's not over yet.
Zh: “奇迹还没有发生。一切还没有结束。”

En: It's not *that* cool. And it's not a person, but an ideology.
Zh: “这个没有*那么*酷。而且它都不是一个人，只是一种意识形态。”

En: *Something*.
Zh: “*某种东西*。”

En: It's simple, Cuno. I have to find *communism*. Communism killed the hanged man.
Zh: “很简单，坤诺。我必须找出*康米主义*。是康米主义杀了那个吊人。”

En: Yeah, like what? He seems to like the idea.
Zh: “是吗，比如说什么？”他好像很喜欢这个主意。

En: The coolest, Cuno. But unfortunately it's an ideology, not a person.
Zh: “这个最酷了，坤诺。不过很可惜，它只是一种意识形态，不是个人。”

En: So... you're gonna go after this *Communism*, or you wanna bounce something else off the Cuno?
Zh: “所以……你打算追踪这个*康米主义*，或者还是想跟坤诺征求别的意见？”

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Communism is stupid, Cuno. And it's not a person. It's an ideology.
Zh: “康米主义很愚蠢，坤诺。而且它不是一个人，是一种意识形态。”

En: Shit... He shakes his head, disappointed. "Playing the Cuno like that... You better have something else for me."
Zh: “见鬼……”他失望的摇摇头。“这样耍坤诺有意思吗……你最好给我来点别的。”

En: Is that like a fucking street name or something? The kid stops to think. "It's pretty cool to Cuno."
Zh: “那是什么鬼街道名之类的吗？”孩子停下来想了想。“在坤诺听起来挺酷的。”

En: C'mon, pig... The kid snaps his fingers. "Thoughts didn't kill Cuno's gimp. It was a person. Even Cuno can figure this shit out."
Zh: “拜托，猪头……”男孩打了个响指。“想法没有杀死坤诺的瘸子。它是个人。就连坤诺都能想明白。”

En: I can suddenly see how it's hard to indict someone who is not actually a person, but an ideology...
Zh: “我突然可以理解了，控诉一个不是真人，而是意识形态的东西到底有多难……”

En: Nothing.
Zh: “没什么。”

En: You're starting to lose the Cuno. He's looking around. "Sounds like you ain't got shit to go by here."
Zh: “你要失去坤诺了。”他看了看周围。“听起来你在这里没什么事可以做了。”

En: Miracle? Shit... What is this weak shit? You gotta watch your own back, miracles don't fuckin' happen in Martinaise. Get real.
Zh: “奇迹？放屁……这他妈都是什么鬼东西？你只能自己小心，他妈的马丁内斯根本没有奇迹。现实点吧。”

En: I'm giving up. Time to start drinking.
Zh: “我要放弃了。是时候开始喝酒了。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Thanks for your help, Cuno. (Conclude.)
Zh: “感谢你的帮助，坤诺。”（总结。）

En: Will-pig. He nods. "You ready to walk, will-pig?"
Zh: “意志坚强的猪头。”他点点头。“我们可以走了吗，猪头？”

En: I don't know but I won't give up, Cuno.
Zh: “我不知道，但我不会放弃的，坤诺。”

En: Fuck off, Cuno's not into this old man piss-drinker shit. There's a short pause as he shakes his head. "You ready to walk now?"
Zh: “滚蛋，坤诺才不喜欢喝醉酒的老男人呢。”他短暂地停顿了一下，接着摇摇头。“现在你准备走了吗？”

En: What, you mute now? Are you *ready to walk*?
Zh: “怎么，现在哑巴了？你*准备*走了吗？”

En: So, listen, pig... The kid seems hesitant suddenly. "Cuno's been thinkin' about shit and, uh... Cuno's coming with you. Help you wrap this shit up. Final-style."
Zh: “所以，听着，猪头……”男孩似乎有些犹豫。“坤诺一直在想这些破事……坤诺会跟你一起走的。帮你解决这些破事。终结的风格。”

En: I'm ready, Cuno. (Conclude.)
Zh: “我准备好了，坤诺。”（总结。）

En: We should check Mrs. Katarzine Alasije's room.
Zh: “我们应该搜查一下卡特琳·艾拉洁小姐的房间。”

En: We should check Miss Oranje Disco Dancer's room.
Zh: “我们应该搜查一下奥兰治那位迪斯科舞者的房间。”

En: We should check Klaasje's room.
Zh: “我们应该搜查一下卡拉洁的房间。”

En: I don't know.
Zh: “我不知道。”

En: I don't know. Let's just aimlessly wander until a clue presents itself.
Zh: “我不知道。我们还是就这么漫无目的地闲逛吧，等线索自己出现。”

En: Fuck, pig... He looks at you with a worried glance. "Cuno doesn't know about this flower shit. Cuno's not feelin' it."
Zh: “去你的，猪头……”他担心地瞥了你一眼。“坤诺不知道这朵破花。坤诺没感觉。”

En: Shit, pig... You better have some more shit than fuckin' roses or something.
Zh: “该死，猪头……你他妈最好别只有这几朵破玫瑰花什么的。”

En: *I* again. Something in him *is* shifting, changing.
Zh: 又是*我*。他身体里有些东西*确实*在变换，在改变。

En: Shit ain't nothing to Cuno, he says with a nod. "What now?"
Zh: “对坤诺来说这他妈不算什么，”他点头说道。“现在怎么办？”

En: All right. Saddle up. (Accept the Cuno.)
Zh: “好吧。给爷备马。”（接受坤诺。）

En: Sorry, Cuno, I can't take you with me. (Refuse the Cuno.)
Zh: “抱歉，坤诺，我不能带着你。”（拒绝坤诺。）

En: All right. Saddle up. (Accept the Cuno.)
Zh: “好吧。给爷备马。”（接受坤诺。）

En: Sorry, Cuno, I can't take you with me. (Refuse the Cuno.)
Zh: “抱歉，坤诺，我不能带着你。”（拒绝坤诺。）

En: Asking for something -- even asking to come along -- doesn't come easy for him.
Zh: 要求什么东西——甚至是要求跟你一起走——对他来说都不太容易。

En: *Why* do you wanna come with me?
Zh: “你*为什么*想跟我一起走？”

En: This scene is dead. He gestures towards the window. "Cuno's outta here -- might as well be a pig, big-up fucky-fingers on my way out."
Zh: “这个场景已经死了。”他朝着窗户比了个手势。“坤诺要离开这里——不如也当个猪头，出去的时候还要骄傲地竖起中指。”

En: Say what you will, but this kid's *hard shit*. He might actually make a good cop one day.
Zh: 随你怎么说，但是这孩子是个*茅坑里的石头*。有一天，他也许真能变成一个好警察。

En: Big-up fucky-fingers? He *is* a *free-thinker*. Beyond the box. Can't argue with that.
Zh: 骄傲地竖起中指？他*确实*是个*自由思想家*。打破常规。这一点无法争辩。

En: Khm... DRUG ASSET DETECTED!
Zh: 嗯……探测到毒品资产！

En: Kid would make a half-decent sharpshooter, no?
Zh: 那孩子会变成一个像样的神枪手，不是吗？

En: Trying to recruit him is like trying to make a pet out of fire. This kid recognizes only one authority -- his own.
Zh: 尝试招募他，就像尝试把火当宠物养。这孩子只认一种权威——就是他自己。

En: Look, this might be his only way out.
Zh: 听着，这可能是他唯一的出路。

En: He is streetwise. Knows the neighbourhood. Knows the people. He could be useful.
Zh: 他是个街头浪子。很了解这片街区。很了解这里的人。他可能很有用场。

En: This is a twelve year old kid. You can't seriously be considering *taking him along*?! What's gonna happen to him?
Zh: 这是一个12岁的孩子。你不会真的在考虑*带上他*吧？他会发生什么事？

En: Look at him. Life hasn't been easy on him. You wanna drag him along and put him through more shit? *Your* shit?
Zh: 看看他。他的生活一直都不容易。你想带上他，让他经历更多的破事吗？*你*那些破事？

En: Now... as to what's going to happen next... (Get up.)
Zh: “现在……关于接下来要发生的事……”（起身。）

En: Yes, gimp... ? Cuno asks, seeing the effort it takes you to stand. "What are you gonna do now? Ride outta here on your shit-river? You'll die alone. Cuno doesn't give a shit now. Too late now. Cuno's gonna hang here and *fuck* your room up again..."
Zh: “是啊，瘸子……”坤诺一边问，一边看着花了老大的劲才站起来的你。“你现在打算怎么做？一瘸一拐地离开这里？你会一个人死去的。坤诺现在都不在乎了。已经太迟了。坤诺要留在这里，再把你的房间*搞得*乱七八糟……”

En: Accepted the Cuno like a motherfucker... He nods respectfully. "What are we gonna do now?"
Zh: “像个狗娘养的一样接受坤诺……”他恭敬地点点头。“现在我们该怎么做？”

En: Thanks, pig. He quickly glances at you, then looks away. "Now get your crippled ass up and tell Cuno, what are we gonna do now?"
Zh: “谢了，猪头。”他快速瞥了你一眼，然后移开了视线。“现在赶快把你残废的大屁股抬起来，告诉坤诺，我们现在要怎么做？”

En: Sorry for what?! For not adding Cuno to your shitshow?! Cuno's not sorry. Cuno's glad. I was just kidding. You couldn't get Cuno for a million reál. You can't even get out bed, loser.
Zh: “抱歉什么？！不让坤诺加入你那个大烂摊子？！坤诺不觉得抱歉。坤诺很高兴。我也是开个玩笑。如果不拿出个几百万雷亚尔，是请不动我坤诺的。你甚至连床都下不来，蠢蛋。”

En: Sorry for what?! For not adding Cuno to your shitshow?! Cuno's not sorry. Cuno's glad. I was just kidding too. You couldn't get Cuno for million reál. Fuck you, okay?
Zh: “抱歉什么？！不让坤诺加入你那个大烂摊子？！坤诺不觉得抱歉。坤诺很高兴。我也是开个玩笑。如果不拿出个几百万雷亚尔，是请不动我坤诺的。去你的吧，懂？”

En: Wow, he did not take that rejection well.
Zh: 哇哦，他不太能接受被拒绝的感觉。

En: Wow, he did not take that rejection well.
Zh: 哇哦，他不太能接受被拒绝的感觉。

En: Now? As to what's going to happen next...
Zh: “现在？至于接下来会发生什么……”

En: Yeah, debrief Cuno. Let Cuno know *the plan*. The kid rubs his hands together.
Zh: “是啊，告诉坤诺。把*计划*告诉坤诺。”男孩摩擦着双手。

En: That sounds like a hella shit plan. You askin' Cuno to come along to your shit-show and you don't even know what to do? Fuckin' check your pig journal or something. C'mon...
Zh: “这计划听起来不错。你让坤诺加入你的狂欢，结果你居然不知道该怎么做？他妈的，看看你的日志或者什么的啊。真是服了……”

En: Bitch next door? That's what Cuno's thinking too, he agrees. "Good call. Let's rock it, pig-man."
Zh: “隔壁的婊子？坤诺也是这么想的，”他表示赞同。“好主意。我们燥起来吧，猪头。”

En: That's Klaasje, right? Bitch next door? Cuno's thinking the same thing, he agrees. "Let's rock it, pig-man."
Zh: “那是卡拉洁，对吧？隔壁那个婊子？坤诺也是这么想的，”他表示赞同。“让我们燥起来吧，猪头。”

En: He's not saying Cuno -- he's saying *I*? And not calling you a f****t or a pig? Is he ill or something?
Zh: 他没有说坤诺——他说了*我*？而且没有叫你混账，或者是猪头？他是病了还是怎么的？

En: Wow... the kid's name must be Cuno. And he's about to take pity on you.
Zh: 哇哦……孩子的名字一定是坤诺，而且他很同情你。

En: Whatever it takes. [Leave.]
Zh: 不管付出多少代价。[离开。]

En: How come you're here, Cuno -- aren't you pissed at me anymore?
Zh: “你怎么在这里，坤诺——你不生我的气了吗？”

En: Didn't you say you and I were done. Professionally?
Zh: “你不是说我和你已经完了吗。从职业上讲？”

En: Don't get all hung up on that yesterday's shit, piggo, the kid says, trying to sound mature. "That was then, this is now. Cuno's all about being in the moment."
Zh: “别老想着昨天的那些破事，猪头，”男孩说道，试着听起来成熟一些。“过去是过去，现在是现在。坤诺是个活在当下的人。”

En: The kid really doesn't seem to harbour any animosity towards you. He seems almost friendly.
Zh: 男孩似乎真的对你没有任何敌意。他几乎可以说是友善。

En:
Wait, but *why* do you forgive me?	“等等，但你*为什么*会原谅我？”
0x0100004000002BA0	Dialogue Text	WHIRLING F2 / CUNO WAKEUP	You	So we're cool now?"
Zh: “所以我们现在没事了？”

En: Listen-listen, Cuno's just big like that. Doesn't need that bitch-ass melodrama. Cuno fires and forgets. Cuno forgives and moves on.
Zh: “听好了，坤诺就是这么度量大。不需要什么那种满腹牢骚的闹剧。坤诺发过火，然后就忘记了。坤诺会选择原谅，然后继续前进。”

En: He doesn't have anyone in the world.
Zh: 在这个世界上，他没有任何人。

En: Yeah, Cuno's letting you off the hook, piggo. He rests his hands on his hips and looks you straight in the eye. "It's a one time boon, from Cunn to pig. The next time you're a dead man."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺帮你摆脱困境了，猪头。”他把手放在臀部，直直地看着你的眼睛。“这是一次性的恩惠，坤诺给猪头的。下一次你就死定了。”

En: We're cool, Cuno,
Zh: “我们没事了，坤诺。”

En: Yeah, that's what Cuno's fuckin' saying, piggo. He's letting you off the hook. He rests his hands on his hips and looks you in the eye. "A one time boon, from Cunn to pig. There won't be a next one."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺也他妈是这么说的，猪头。他帮你摆脱困境了。”他把手放在臀部，直直地看着你的眼睛。“这是一次性的恩惠，坤诺给猪头的。不会有下一次了。”

En: Sire, the boy believes this to be true. He's giving you a last chance.
Zh: 大人，这个男孩相信这是真的。他在给您最后一次机会。

En: Coinslot's dead.
Zh: “眯眯眼死了。”

En: Wait... what?
Zh: “等等……什么？”

En: No... no, no...
Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Just kidding, piggo, he chuckles. "The boo-boo wagon took the binoclard away. He's probably gonna live."
Zh: “开玩笑的，猪头，”他轻声笑了。“那辆愚蠢的货車把四眼仔带走了。他应该能活下来。”

En: The what? Where did they take him?
Zh: “什么？他们把他带到哪里去了？”

En: To the hospital, fucktard. Try to keep up with Cuno. He glares at you with something akin to respect...
Zh: “去医院啊，智障。跟上坤诺的节奏好吗。”他带着一种近乎尊敬的眼神看着你……

En: You can barely hear him, the pain is so bad.
Zh: 你几乎听不见他的声音，实在是太疼了。

En: I'm in pain, what... happened?
Zh: “我感觉很痛，发生……什么事了？”

En: Cuno just told you your friend is dead! And you're crying about pain? That doesn't seem right to Cuno. He shakes his head. "The binoclard was alright, he didn't deserve that shit..."
Zh: “坤诺刚告诉过你，你的朋友死了！你还好意思喊疼？在坤诺看来这可不对。”他摇摇头。“四眼仔没事，他不应该受那种罪……”

En: Nah, Cuno's just lying to you. The fucking boo-boo wagon took four-eyes away. He's probably gonna live.
Zh: “没啦，坤诺骗你的。那辆愚蠢的货車把四眼带走了。他应该能活下来。”

En: They say you burned half the city down. Thousands dead. That's very cool to Cuno. I thought I'd stick around.
Zh: “他们说你把半个城市都烧毁了。死了好几千人。在坤诺看来，这简直酷毙了。我想我会留下来。”

En: They say you shot that fucker in the face. That's fucking cool to Cuno. He looks down. "So I thought I'd stick around."
Zh: “他们说你朝着那个傻瓜的脸开了一枪。在坤诺看来，这他妈真是酷炸天了。”他垂下双眼。“所以，我想我会留下来。”

En: They say you got a lot of people killed. Like half the town. They say you didn't do shit. He looks down. "I guess that's cool, so I thought I'd stick around."
Zh: “他们说你害死了很多人，差不多城里有一半吧。他们说你屁事都没做。”他垂下双眼。“我觉得挺酷的，所以我想我会留下来。”

En: Hold on... There's something different about you, Cuno...
Zh: “等等……你好像有点不一样了，坤诺……”

En: Go away, Cuno... Let me die in peace.
Zh: “走开，坤诺……让我一个人安静地死去吧。”

En: Nah... Cuno's just off speed for a few days... There's a melancholy look in his eyes.
Zh: “不……坤诺有几天没嗑思必得了……”他的眼神有些忧郁。

En: Being off speed makes Cuno sad. Makes Cuno *think* about shit. He makes vague gestures around his head with his fingers.
Zh: “没嗑思必得，坤诺很悲伤。让坤诺很*想念*那种狗屁东西。”他用手指在头上比划了些含糊的手势。

En: Now's not the time to shit the bed, pig. He spits. "C'mon, baconman, Cuno's gonna help you hold your shit in."
Zh: “现在可不是他妈的睡觉时间，猪头。”他吐了口口水。“来吧，死肥仔，坤诺帮你。”

En: Be straight with me. I need to get my bearings.
Zh: “坦白跟我讲吧。我想理清现在的状况。”

En: Sure, Cuno's gonna help you with that. Cuno's in a *giving* mood right now.
Zh: “当然，坤诺会帮你的。坤诺现在的心情*很好*。”

En: He's saying *I* now? And not calling you a f****t or a pig? Is he ill or something?
Zh: 他现在居然会用*我*这个字了？而且没有叫你混账，或者是猪头？他是病了还是怎么的？

En: Sounds like he's alright after all.
Zh: 听起来他好的很。

En: What happened to my room?
Zh: “我的房间是怎么回事？”

En: What happened to me?
Zh: “我怎么了？”

En: Babybeard was in here. Was probably a *bitch* to clean this shit up... This seems to please him.
Zh: “小胡子来过这里。像个*婊子*一样清理这堆垃圾……”这好像让他很开心。

En: *Babybeard*... that can only be Garte, the cafeteria manager.
Zh: *小胡子*……那只可能是加尔特了，那个餐厅经理。

En: You tore some shit up there, pig. Cuno is looking at you like a tamed wolf would look at his master. Like an equal. "Got shot too."
Zh: “你把什么鬼东西撕裂了，猪头。”坤诺看着你，就像一头被驯服的野狼看着自己的主人。平等对待。“而且也中枪了。”

En: How badly am I hurt?
Zh: “我伤的有多重？”

En: Pretty fucking bad, Cuno thinks. He points to your left leg. "But you're one lucky pig. The doc took the bullet out and said you'll live."
Zh: “坤诺觉得，还真他妈挺糟糕的。”他指着你的左腿。“但你是个幸运的猪头。医生把子弹取出来了，说你会没事的。”

En: Then his expression mellows. "Cuno thinks you got shot twice. In the shoulder and in the leg. The leg's pretty fucking nasty, but a doctor looked you over and took the bullet out."
Zh: 然后，他的表情变得柔和起来。“坤诺觉得你中了两枪。肩膀还有大腿。大腿那里挺严重的，不过医生来检查过，把子弹取出来了。”

En: How would Cuno know? Cuno's not a fucking doctor. He looks at you like you're an idiot.
Zh: “坤诺怎么知道？坤诺又他妈的不是医生。”他像看傻子一样看着你。

En: Pretty fucking bad, Cuno thinks. He points to your left leg. "But you're one lucky pig. The doc took the bullet out and said you'll live."
Zh: “坤诺觉得，还真他妈挺糟糕的。”他指着你的左腿。“但你是个幸运的猪头。医生把子弹取出来了，说你会没事的。”

En: Can I... walk?
Zh: “我还可以……走路吗？”

En: You got shot in the shoulder too, but luckily you were wearing that fancy teapot and it took the hit for you.
Zh: “你的肩膀也中了一枪，不过算你走运，你身上那件花里胡哨的茶壶，帮你挡住了那颗子弹。”

En: The shoulder's fine, probably... The doc didn't seem too worried about it -- said the bullet went right through.
Zh: “肩膀大概没什么事……医生好像不太担心——说子弹正好穿过去了。”

En: The bullet must have passed through your shoulder blade, missing your lung and your heart. You lucky son of a bitch...
Zh: 子弹肯定是穿过了你的肩胛骨，没有伤到肺和心脏。你这个狗娘养的还真走运……

En: Are your legs attached to Cuno? Can the *Cuno* move your legs? The fuck should I know...
Zh: “你的腿长在坤诺身上了？*坤诺*能动你的腿？我他妈怎么知道……”

En: With considerable pain, and a stitch tearing every now and then, you should be able to do it.
Zh: 伴随着相当大的疼痛，还有时不时撕裂的缝线——你应该能做到。

En: Through tears and blood and stitches tearing it *should* be possible. From time to time...
Zh: 通过血和泪，还有那撕裂的缝线，偶尔……*应该*还是可能的。

En: You can walk. If it's possible, then by pure willpower alone. You're a psycholocomotor.
Zh: 你可以走。如果可能的话，那就只能是依靠纯粹的意志力。你会变成一个心灵电动马达。

En: You won't be able to dance much, that's for sure. But you should be able to live with limping around. If you can call that a life.
Zh: 可以肯定的是，你应该没办法怎么跳舞了。不过一瘸一拐走路还是可以的。如果你觉得这也能被称为生活的话。

En: I'm a psycholocomotor, Cuno.
Zh: “我是个心灵电动马达，坤诺。”

En: Cuno lets out a whistle. "That's pretty cool to Cuno. Cuno's also a psycho."
Zh: 坤诺吹了声口哨。“在坤诺看来很酷啊，坤诺也是个神经病。”

En: You keep asking all this *weird shit* from Cuno that the Cuno has no way of knowing about.
Zh: “你老是问坤诺这些*奇怪的屁事*，坤诺哪里能知道。”

En: Has anyone from my station been to see me?
Zh: “我的警局有人来看过我吗？”

En: Do you know who treated me, Cuno?
Zh: “你知道是谁帮我治疗的吗，坤诺？”

En: Cuno did.
Zh: “坤诺做的。”

En: He didn't.
Zh: 他没有。

En: Thanks, Cuno, you're a life saver.
Zh: “谢谢你，坤诺，你是我的救命恩人。”

En: You said there was a doctor who removed the bullet from my leg.
Zh: “你刚说有个医生把我大腿里的子弹取出来了。”

En: C'mon, man... who *really* did it?
Zh: “拜托，伙计……*到底*是谁做的？”

En: Yeah... Some cunt from your station came over and knife fucked you, when you were sleeping.
Zh: “是啊……你警局来了个家伙，在你睡觉的时候，用刀玩弄了你一下。”

En: It's cool. He nods seriously. "Just remember -- Cuno doesn't save shit for free."
Zh: “很酷啊。”他认真地点点头。“只要记住——坤诺可不会免费救人的。”

En: Some doctor your pig friends sent over. Nix Fucklieb, I think. Total cunt. He spits on the ground. "Came in here and knife fucked you, when you where sleeping. Then fucked off and told me to phone him if you shit yourself."
Zh: “你的猪头朋友派来的医生。好像是尼克斯·什么列布。一个贱货。”他朝地上吐了口唾沫。“在你睡觉的时候用刀玩弄了你一下。然后他妈的就走了，还说如果你大便失禁的话就给他打电话。”

En: Are you hurt?
Zh: “你受伤了吗？”

En: *Why* in the name of fuck would Cuno be hurt? The kid rolls his eyes at you.
Zh: “*为什么*坤诺他妈的会受伤啊？”男孩朝你翻了翻白眼。

En: Cuno's fucking smart, Cuno wasn't *in* that fuck-pile. Cuno knows when shit goes south, unlike you.
Zh: “坤诺他妈的很聪明，坤诺不在那个该死的粪坑*里面*。坤诺知道情况会变糟，不像你。”

En: My... disco days are done.
Zh: “我的……迪斯科岁月已经结束了。”

En: I feel fantastic. Let's... rock.
Zh: “我感觉非常好。我们……燥起来吧！”

En: Who cares. Who cares about me. It doesn't matter.
Zh: “谁在乎。谁关心过我。不重要了。”

En: Gnhhhh...
Cuno observes you getting on your feet and says nothing.
Zh: 坤诺注意到你想站起来，但什么也没说。

En: Cuno can see you're trying to shit him, but Cuno's unshittable, so fuck does Cuno care?
Zh: “坤诺看得出来，你他妈是想骗他，但是坤诺不好骗，所以坤诺他妈的为什么要在乎？”

En: Cuno's got zero patience for this weepy shit. Cuno's been through way worse than this.
Zh: “坤诺没耐心管这些哭唧唧的屁事了。坤诺经历过的事比这个糟糕的多。”

En: So how is it?
Zh: “所以怎么样了？”

En: (Get up -- slowly.)
Zh: （起来——慢一点。）

En: Go easy, pig. You wanna lean on the Cuno or something?
Zh: “慢点，猪头。你是想靠在坤诺身上还是怎么的？”

En: I'm very bad, Cuno. Things are very bad.
Zh: “我是个坏人，坤诺。情况真的很糟糕。”

En: You can take it. Just don't lean on the old leg too heavily.
Zh: 你可以承受住的。只要不把太多重量放在大腿上。

En: Your balance is *way* off. You feel like you're about to fall over.
Zh: 你的平衡能力差了*很多*。你感觉自己要摔倒了。

En: Yeah... you got lucky there, pig. Maybe now Cuno can show you what real brutal hard music is.
Zh: “是啊……你很走运，猪头。也许现在坤诺可以让你看看，什么是真正狂野的硬核摇滚。”

En: Still, you see something akin to respect in his eyes.
Zh: 不过你依然还是在他的眼睛里捕捉到了一些类似尊重的东西。

En: You see Cuno's familiar shape in the FALN pants. It turns double -- then triple -- from the pain. He says:
Zh: 你看见坤诺那熟悉的FALN裤子。因为痛楚，你看到他变成了两个——然后是三个。他说道：

En: You see the shape of a prepubescent boy in FALN pants. It turns double -- then triple -- from the pain. He says:
Zh: 你看见一个穿着FALN，还没到青春期的孩子。因为痛楚，你看到他变成了两个——然后是三个。他说道：

En: Wow... Cuno's about to take pity on you. That's unexpected.
Zh: 哇哦……坤诺居然会同情你。这还真是没想到。

En: Do you remember the scent of your childhood?
Zh: 你还记得童年的味道吗？

En: I can get it all back.
Zh: 我能把它们全部找回来。

En: I remember nothing.
Zh: 我什么也不记得了。

En: I was born in a hospital where people usually go to die.
Zh: 我出生在一家医院，那里一般是别人死去的地方。

En: I don't want to come back.
Zh: 我不想回去。

En: What *is* this?
Zh: 这*是*什么？

En: God... there's *another* type?
Zh: 天啊……还有*其他*种类吗？

En: You know who I am. I am the bad day. The one where you ask her, and then later in the streets, wandering... It's the worst day of all time, Harry dear, and it's coming. She will hear about it on the phone.
Zh: 你知道我是谁。我是糟糕的一天。就在那一天，你问了她，之后一个人走在街上，游荡……那是你人生中最糟糕的一天，亲爱的哈里，而且它就要来了。她会在电话里听说这件事的。

En: Do you remember your wife's hand on your face?
Zh: 你还记得妻子的手抚摸你的脸庞吗？

En: Reality will turn into a grotesque nightmare. This'll be the last thing you did to her. Tell me -- do you remember the love of your life?
Zh: 现实会变成怪诞的噩梦。这会是你对她做的最后一件事。告诉我——你还记得自己此生的最爱吗？

En: Stinky boy.
Zh: 臭小子。

En: You're not kidding anyone, Harry. You don't remember shit. Tell me...
Zh: 你没有跟任何人开玩笑，哈里。你不记得了。告诉我……

En: Oh yes, party boy. And it's *worse* than the one before! Just think of the shit you saw! Here it comes too, so soon already! A silent alarm goes off in your head, like clockwork, barely let you sleep at all... Time to get those clothes on, Harry!
Zh: 没错，派对小子。而且这次比之前还要*糟糕*！想想你看见的那些烂事！它也要来了，这么快就来了！寂静的警铃在你脑海中响起，就像钟表，根本不让你好好睡觉……是时候穿上衣服了，哈里！

En: I was left.
Zh: 我被抛弃了。

En: You're not coming back from shit! Thrashing around in that *high-conductivity state* of yours, bumping into things and acting like a *clown*. Who are you kidding?
Zh: 你不可能摆脱这件破事回到从前！像你那样在那种*高导状态*中垂死挣扎，横冲直撞，表现的像个*小丑*一样。你在骗谁呢？

En: I left.
Zh: 我离开了。

En: I'm trying to solve... trying to solve this case.
Zh: 我想试着……试着去解决这起案件。

En: TELL ME WHAT THIS IS!!! I'm not answering before you tell me who you are.
Zh: 告诉我这是什么！！在你告诉我自己是谁之前，我是不会回答的。

En: That's right, funky-baby, and you just stood there. One hand on the bottle and the other on your dick -- watching her go. Let it all be dragged away from you.
Zh: 没错，你这个胆小鬼，只是呆呆地站在那里。一只手握着酒瓶，另一只手抓住自己的下体——看着她离你远去。让一切都从你身边溜走。

En: I can come back from this.
Zh: 我可以从这事恢复过来的。

En: What it says on the can, Harry. Answer the question.
Zh: 罐头上写的是什么，哈里。快回答问题。

En: Your mind is what now? I can't hear you, the rest is just a word-dream. Jumbled up garbage. The pictures are gone, the bed rises to meet you. A thin, sleep-like state. More glass than velvet, *grinding* in your head.
Zh: 你在想什么？我听不见你的声音，剩下的只不过是词句的梦境。乱七八糟的垃圾。画面不见了，床升起来迎接你。一种纤薄的，像睡觉一样的状态。比起天鹅绒，更像是玻璃，在你的脑海里*碾磨*着。

En: You'll be back in those cold snake skins in no time, sweating up the bed...
Zh: 你很快就会钻回那冰冷的蛇皮里，在床上汗流浃背……

En: What? No!
Zh: 什么？不要！

En: Oh no, funky-baby, you *stayed*. It was the rest of it that left. While you just stood there. With one hand on the bottle and the other on your dick -- watching it go.
Zh: 哦不，时髦宝贝儿，你*留下来*了。是其余的部分离开了你。在你只是呆呆站在那里的时候。一只手抓着瓶子，另一只握着下体——目送它远去。

En: Help me...
Zh: 帮帮我……

En: Everything. The pale and the isolas -- on the surface -- the outer magnetosphere... Burning, furious truth, eight thousand years of written history.
Zh: 所有一切。灰域和洲——就在表面——外层的磁气圈……燃烧着，狂怒的真理，8千年书写的历史。

En: Tell me, where are your friends? Human beings have friends, Harry-boy. Where the hell are yours?
Zh: 告诉我，你的朋友在哪？人类都有朋友，小哈里。你的朋友都在哪里？

En: So-something is *wrong*. Sleep shouldn't be this bad. This dry. This un-nourishing. There's something wrong with your thoughts. Some kind of... new type of hangover...
Zh: 有-有些不太*对劲*。睡觉不应该是这么糟糕的感觉。如此干燥。毫无营养。你的思想出了点问题。某种……新型的宿醉……

En: No, Harry. You were just talking to yourself. That's all you ever do. Even in your dreams. And the act is wearing thin, the spots of the disco ball fade around you...
Zh: 不，哈里。你只是在自言自语。你一直都是这么做的。甚至在梦里也是一样。演出逐渐消失，迪斯科彩球的斑点也从你周围渐渐褪去……

En: You said... who?
Zh: 你在说……谁？

En: I've talked to you before.
Zh: 我之前跟你说过话。

En: I've seen you before...
Zh: 我之前见过你……

En: Help you, why? I can't hear you, the rest is just a word-dream. Jumbled up garbage. The pictures are gone, the bed rises to meet you. A thin, sleep-like state. More glass than velvet, *grinding* in your head.
Zh: 帮你，为什么？我听不见你的声音，剩下的只不过是词句的梦境。乱七八糟的垃圾。画面不见了，床升起来迎接你。一种纤薄的，像睡觉一样的状态。比起天鹅绒，更像是玻璃，在你的脑海里*碾磨*着。

En: You really dropped the ball, Harry. Four point six billion people -- and you failed every single one of them. You really *fucked up*.
Zh: 你真的把事情搞糟了，哈里。46亿人——你辜负了他们每一个。你真的*搞砸*了。

En: They were only cramping your *descent into the abyss*. Now they're gone. Three times gone and never coming back -- all of it. You failed. You failed me.
Zh: 它们只会束缚着你，*坠入深渊*。现在它们都走了。走远了，再也不会回来——全都不复归来。你失败了。你辜负了我。

En: What is Elysium?
Zh: 极乐世界是什么？

En: Do you remember the warmth of her thighs, between her legs and in her mouth?
Zh: 你还记得她唇角和双腿之间的温度吗？

En: No. It's gone. Three times gone and never coming back. You failed. You failed me.
Zh: 不。它不在了。第三次离去，再也不会回来——全都不复归来。你失败了。你辜负了我。

En: My mind is tired and broken.
Zh: 我的精神疲惫而破碎。

En: You failed Elysium.
Zh: 你辜负了极乐世界。

En: You're trying to what? I can't hear you, this is just a word-dream now. Jumbled up garbage. The pictures are gone, the bed rises to meet you. A thin sleep-like state. More glass than velvet, *grinding* in your head.
Zh: 你想干什么？我听不见你的声音，剩下的只不过是词句的梦境。乱七八糟的垃圾。画面不见了，床升起来迎接你。一种纤薄的，像睡觉一样的状态。比起天鹅绒，更像是玻璃，在你的脑海里*碾磨*着。

En: No, you haven't. You're just sleep-talking. And the act is wearing thin too, the spots on the disco ball fade around you...
Zh: 不，你没有。你只是在说梦话。这出戏逐渐消失，迪斯科彩球的斑点也从你周围渐渐褪去……

En: Time to go to work in the shit factory!
Zh: 是时候回到那个该死的工厂上班了！

En: Why?
Zh: 为什么？

En: Maybe it's the bed's fault?
Zh: 也许是床的错？

En: Check the pillow.
Zh: 检查枕头。

En: Check the blanket.
Zh: 检查毛毯。

En: Roll over to the other side.
Zh: 翻向另一边。

En: It's a little better... Colours, scenes, and half-formed phrases still litter your mind. Part of you is still trying to solve the case, isn't it?
Zh: 感觉好点了……颜色，场景，还有尚未成型的话语仍然散落在你的脑海中。你的一部分还在试着解决这起案件，不是吗？

En: Its synthetic filling has separated into hard lumps. The pillowcase smells oddly.
Zh: 里面的人造填料已经分成了一个个硬块。枕套的味道闻起来有些奇怪。

En: It barely covers your toes, stretching over your soft belly. This is your body here, intimate and warm, breathing...
Zh: 它顺着你柔软的腹部一路延伸，勉强盖住了你的脚趾。这是你的身体，私密而温暖，正在呼吸……

En: Smells of alcohol and sweat. And grease.
Zh: 酒精和汗水的味道。还有油脂。

En: A bit tense in the muscles -- relax.
Zh: 肌肉有些紧张——放松点。

En: Breathing, are you sure? Your heart beats a little bit faster at this unnerving thought.
Zh: 在呼吸，你确定？这种让人不安的想法冒了出来，你的心脏开始加速跳动。

En: Who killed him? Who?
Zh: 谁杀了他？是谁？

En: No more thoughts. Fall asleep now...
Zh: 别想了，赶紧睡觉吧……

En: Something to do with... What was it that the lieutenant said? Union? And it's gone again, your thoughts lost between the slowing brain waves.
Zh: 跟什么有关来着……警督是怎么说的？工会？它又不见了，你的想法遗失在逐渐放慢的脑电波中。

En: Your breathing steadies. A great silence washes over you... until your eyelids *twitch* in your sleep and images... images start forming...
Zh: 你的呼吸很沉稳。一种巨大的寂静向你冲刷而来……直到你的眼皮在睡梦和想象中*抽动*……图像慢慢开始形成……

En: And then -- sleep doesn't come.
Zh: 然后——睡眠并没有如期而至。

En: Under your thrumming eyelids, you see a dizzying array of colours. You won't get off this carousel quite so easily.
Zh: 在抽动的眼皮下，你看见一团眼花缭乱的颜色。你无法轻易摆脱眼前的这个彩色旋转木马。

En: But I *want* to sleep...
Zh: 但是我*想*睡觉……

En: Obviously -- you're in bed with your eyes closed. But it's not happening.
Zh: 显然——你躺在床上，双眼紧闭。但是它没有发生。

En: Here we are again, my broken bird. The waves are coming... carrying you away... but you can't go. No -- you have to stay. Always half-aware of yourself.
Zh: 我们又来到这里了，受伤的小鸟。海浪即将到来……把你带走……但你不能走。不可以——你必须留下来。一直这样停留在半梦半醒之间。

En: You're not *cooperating* brother-man.
Zh: 老兄，你可一点都不*配合* 。

En: Why?
Zh: 为什么？

En: And there's a lot of it. Ever present in your organs. It's like every one of them has their own *nasty* song to sing.
Zh: 而且是很多痛苦。永远存在于你的器官里。仿佛每一个都要唱响*恶意*的歌曲。

En: Oh yeah, baby. Frame your suffering as a masterpiece. Only one problem -- no one's watching. It's boring, buddy, boring as death.
Zh: 没错，宝贝。把你的痛苦当作是一件绝世杰作装裱起来。只有一个问题——没有人在看。这多无聊啊，伙计，像死亡一样无聊。

En: Don't be stupid Harry, it's not happening. They don't make new *kidneys* and *livers* in hospital. All you've got to do is pray to god it passes -- while you *stare* at the flickering darkness.
Zh: 别傻了，哈里，这样没用的。他们不会在医院里制造新的*肾脏*和*肝脏*。你唯一能做的就是向神明祈祷它会过去——当你*凝望*那片若隐若现的黑暗的时候。

En: Some of them are. Some of them are nice. Others are scared.
Zh: 有些是的。有些很友好。其他的很可怕。

En: Oh, baby boy. You're already *in* the other place. There's no nourishment for you tonight. Maybe tomorrow?
Zh: 哦，小男孩。你已经*在*其他地方了。今晚没有养分留给你了。也许明天？

En: Maybe if you... you know... like... TOOK A LOT OF DRUGS? Before you go to sleep. That'd do the trick...
Zh: 也许，如果你……你知道的……比如……嗑很多药？在你睡觉之前。这样说不定就行了……

En: At least they're *interesting*. Each one has a process just like yours, running in the space between their ears, full of secrets.
Zh: 至少他们*很有意思*。每一个都有跟你一样的过程，在他们的两耳之间奔跑，满是秘密。

En: Thou art honourable and just, sire. 'Tis the snakes who are vile! Hissing in the grass...
Zh: 大人，您是可敬而公正的。但那些毒蛇确是卑鄙下作的！在草丛中发出嘶嘶的声响……

En: Women. It's the women. Look out for the women. They're *oathbreakers*...
Zh: 女人。是女人。小心女人。她们都是*弃誓者*……

En: Maybe if you cracked the damn thing, then you'd feel satisfied and tired. Holding the picture puzzle in your hands... complete!
Zh: 也许你可以打破这个该死的东西，然后就能感到满足和疲惫。把拼图板握在手里……完成一切！

En: Maybe if you weren't so hard on yourself...
Zh: 也许你可以不对自己如此苛刻……

En: People are beautiful. Statuesque. Parodies and tragedies of themselves. A great democracy of creatures...
Zh: 人类是美丽的。拥有如雕像般美丽的轮廓。拙劣的模仿着自己的悲剧。一种伟大又民主的生物……

En: Come now. Humans have earned your trust. And you theirs...
Zh: 来吧。人类赢得了你的信任。而你也赢得了他们的……

En: It's your disgusting *body*. Even through your sleep, you feel a vague discomfort suffusing it. Your belly and your sides are unpleasantly tender. You wish you could curl up into a foetal ball of safety, but you cannot -- because of the PAIN.
Zh: 那是你恶心的*身体*。就算是在睡梦中，你也能感觉到身体里隐约充斥着一种不适感。你的腹部和侧面柔软地让人不悦。你希望自己能像婴儿一样蜷缩成一个安全的圆球，但你做不到——因为痛苦还在。

En: Every cell in your body is moaning in agony, asking,  "What did we ever do to you?"
Zh: 你身体里的每一个细胞都在痛苦地呻吟，询问着，“我们到底对你做过什么？”

En: These are my just desserts. I will endure this pain with *dignity*.
Zh: 这些只是我的饭后甜点。我会用自己的*尊严*熬过这份痛楚。

En: That pain in your right side is your enlarged liver, by the way. As for your kidneys... you've really been compounding the damage lately.
Zh: 顺便说一句，身体右侧的痛楚来自你增大的肝脏。至于你的肾……最近真的可以说是雪上加霜。

En: No, please... Where is that blessed nothingness? That sweet oblivion?
Zh: 不，求求你……那片神圣的虚无在哪里？那甜美的湮灭呢？

En: I'm an artist and liver damage is my art.
Zh: 我是一个艺术家，肝脏损伤就是我的艺术作品。

En: I'm sorry, cells! It's all me! It's my fault!
Zh: 很抱歉，细胞！全都怪我！都是我的错！

En: This body's worthless anyway... no one does anything nice to it.
Zh: 反正这具身体一文不值……没人对它做过什么好事。

En: *Now* you're finally thinking about something other than yourself. Let's see how far that'll get you.
Zh: *现在*你总算是开始考虑自己以外的事情了。就让我们看看你能走多远。

En: And why might *that* be the case? What love alights on such a bloated corpse-to-be?
Zh: 为什么会*这样*呢？到底有什么样的爱会降落在这具行将就木的臃肿尸体上？

En: There's no dignity here... only reflections of your body mass. Flashes of the day. You keep coming back to yourself in the mirror -- but why? To admire all your *accomplishments*?
Zh: 这里根本没有尊严……只有你身体状况的真实反映。每一天的点点滴滴。你不断回到镜子中的自己旁边——但是为什么呢？来欣赏你的所有*成就*吗？

En: You had your chance, Harry-boy, and you missed it. Started thrashing around, acting all brave -- now the Dark Centre has vanished. You'll never get back to it.
Zh: 你有过机会的，小哈里，但你却错过了。开始摇摆不定，表现的非常勇敢——现在黑暗中心已经消失。你永远也回不去了。

En: I think I... need medical attention.
Zh: 我想我……需要医疗看护。

En: Oh yes. *They'll* check you out, give you some pills, make it all okay. The wonder-makers.
Zh: 是的。*他们*会检查你的身体，给你开药，让它变好。那些奇迹的缔造者。

En: What do you think you're doing right now? Coming to some greater awareness? Look at all these lights! Blinking in and out of existence -- *thoughts*! You're just *pretending* that you're asleep, even to yourself. While the world goes on without you...
Zh: 你以为自己现在在做什么？突然有了更深刻的认知？看看这些光亮！忽明忽暗——那是你的*思想*！你只是*假装*自己睡着了，甚至连自己都要欺骗。然而没有你，这个世界依然会继续前行……

En: Just get me out of here then. Back to the other place.
Zh: 那就赶快让我离开这里。回到另一个地方。

En: ...But it never seems to let *you* go, does it? Time to rise and wipe that shining sweat off as best you can. Gather your bearings. Rock and roll.
Zh: ……但它似乎永远都不会让*你*走，是吗？是时候站起来，用尽全力擦掉那些闪亮的汗水了。找到属于你的位置。摇滚起来！

En: That pain in your right side is your enlarged liver, by the way. As for your kidneys... you've really been compounding the damage lately. And, trust me, you don't want me to do the maths.
Zh: 顺便说一句，身体右侧的痛楚来自你增大的肝脏。至于你的肾……最近真的可以说是雪上加霜。还有，相信我，你不会想让我来做这些数学题的。

En: It's all the system's fault. The system failed me.
Zh: 这全都是系统的错。是系统辜负了我。

En: Yes, your body is a system, and and it's failing you because you're failing it.
Zh: 是的，你的身体就是一个系统，它辜负你，是因为你辜负了它。

En: You're just stuck here. In the half-world. Could try looking at other people. *Really* looking. But why would you want to start doing that?
Zh: 你被困在这里了。在这个灵界。可以试着看看其他人。*真正的*看着。但你为什么要这么做呢？

En: I will! I'm looking at people all the time. I like them.
Zh: 我会的！我会一直看着所有人。我喜欢他们。

En: Human beings will *always* betray you.
Zh: 人类会*一直*背叛你的。

En: How many promises have *you* kept lately, Sir Harry? To the great, see-through world, the tenderness?
Zh: *你*最近遵守了多少诺言，哈里先生？对这个伟大而透明的世界的诺言，对这份亲切和温柔的诺言？

En: Sure, you do. They're all so friendly, aren't they?
Zh: 当然了。他们都很友好，不是吗？

En: Put on your prettiest face for the masses!
Zh: 把你最漂亮的模样展现在所有人面前！

En: Let it! Let it!
Zh: 顺其自然！顺其自然！

En: I thought I was on the express to The Silence!
Zh: 我想自己正乘坐在通往寂静的高速列車上！

En: Hey, what is this? I was on the express to Zero-Holm!
Zh: 喂，这是什么？我正在通往零之沙舟的高速列車上！

En: Wait, wasn't this the express to Fuck-All-Borough?
Zh: 等等，难道这不是开往操蛋自治区的高速列車吗？

En: Now, you've gone off the rails, baby, now you're stuck sitting here by the tracks, admiring the wreck around you. You just can't help it: looking at yourself, the sum total of your *accomplishments*...
Zh: 现在，你已经出轨了，宝贝。你被困坐在铁道旁边，欣赏着周围的断壁颓垣。你根本控制不住：看看你自己，看看你所有*成就*的总和……

En: But this suffering -- it must have *some* kind of meaning... A story that will come out of it. Perhaps even a story that you will write yourself?
Zh: 但是这份痛苦——它一定有*某种*含义……里面肯定蕴藏着一个故事。甚至可能是你写给自己的一个故事？

En: [Open your eyes.]
Zh: [睁开双眼。]

En: Thoughts, baby. A million little lights in the dark. You're one fine instrument, brother -- all those faces and all those names, all that laughter and screaming and scheming around... Every corner and every street...
Zh: 思想，宝贝。那是黑暗中无数的小光点。你是一种精密仪器，兄弟——所有那些面孔和名字，所有那些笑声、尖叫和诡计……每一个角落，每一条街道……

En: Recorded in you. Forever. On ferrotape.
Zh: 记录在你身体里。永远永远。留在湿版相片上。

En: On and on it goes, for untold hours. At the disco where you first asked her to dance. Rising -- rising! -- above the dark curvature. The great wingspan of sleep, studded with stars.
Zh: 一直就这样没完没了，时间无穷无尽。就在你第一次邀请她跳舞的那家迪斯科舞厅。起来吧——站起来！——越过黑暗的弧线。睡眠那宽大的翼幅上，点缀着无数闪亮的星。

En: Spinning on empty.
Zh: 空空地旋转。

En: Spinning in eternity.
Zh: 永恒地旋转。

En: Spinning, spinning... tell me, am I dreaming?
Zh: 旋转，旋转……告诉我，我在做梦吗？

En: No. You're spinning tapes at the discotheque. The great, unceasing disco of the mind. The flash! The bang! The endless *learning* experience.
Zh: 不。你是迪斯科舞厅旋转的磁带。伟大的，永不停歇的心灵迪斯科。那些闪光！那些震撼的节奏！永无止尽的*学习*经验。

En: Behold, there are *millions* of them down there. The first time. The last time. The smoke in her mouth, the potted flowers, the faces: turning, changing.
Zh: 看啦，下面有*数百万个*它们。这是第一次。这是最后一次。她嘴里吐出的香烟，那些盆栽花卉，那些面孔：在旋转，在变换。

En: *What* is it?
Zh: 那是*什么*？

En: It's the *world*, Harry-boy. And you're *made* of it. Every day you're out there you make more of yourself from it. I'm afraid you can't be *unmade* now.
Zh: 那是*世界*，小哈里。而你是由它*组成*的。你在外面停留的每一天，都会从中收获更多的自己。恐怕现在你已经无法*复原*了。

En: The rain, the snow... I don't want to. It's beautiful.
Zh: 雨水，雪花……我不想。这样很美。

En: You can never forget this shit.
Zh: 你永远也忘不掉这档子破事。

En: The colours. The voices.
Zh: 那些色彩。那些声音。

En: The endless visions. Erase them.
Zh: 无休无止的幻觉。抹去它们的存在。

En: Beautiful? It's *stuck* on loop... whirling, spitting out words and images.
Zh: 美丽？它被*困在*循环里了……旋转着，喷吐出言语和画面。

En: It's not possible anymore. It's *stuck* on loop... Whirling, spitting out words and images.
Zh: 再也不可能了。它被*困在*循环里了……旋转着，喷吐出言语和画面。

En: All *stuck* on loop... Whirling, spitting out words and images.
Zh: 全都*困在*循环里了……旋转着，喷吐出言语和画面。

En: You're the son of the World again. Harrister -- a ceaseless agent picking up litter and old newspapers, collecting your little bubble gum wrappers and idiotic picture post cards. Meaningless, meaningless keepsakes.
Zh: 你再次变成了世界之子，哈里——永无休止的代理人，捡拾着垃圾和旧报纸，收集小小的口香糖纸，还有那些愚蠢的风景明信片。毫无意义，毫无意义的纪念品。

En: Reading your awful letters and *recalling* things, aren't you? The endless names of the world... An address book, you are. The map of a city.
Zh: 阅读这些可怕的信件，*回想起*那些事情，不是吗？世界上那些永无止境的名字……你是一本地址簿。一个城市的地图。

En: That's right. I *am* an agent of the world.
Zh: 没错。我*就是*世界的代理人。

En: But what if I want to be the agent of nothing?
Zh: 但是，如果我不想做任何东西的代理呢。

En: You'll go insane if you keep going like this. One more day and you'll be in the loonie bin. I just know you will. And for what, brother-man?
Zh: 如果继续这样做下去的话，你一定会发疯的。再多一天，你就会把自己送进疯人院。我知道你会的。这又是为了什么呢，老大哥？

En: It's too late. You're not *made* of nothing anymore, you're something now, Harry. I tried to drown you in the black water but you re-emerged. Kicking and screaming. Running. And for what?
Zh: 太迟了。你不再是无的*造物*，现在你是某种东西了，哈里。我试着把你溺死在黑水里，但你重新浮了上来。拳打脚踢，惊声尖叫。拼命奔跑。这又是为了什么呢？

En: Solving your little crossword puzzles? Doing your tasks, crossing names off your lists? Trying to become some sort of world-detector... It won't make it *okay*. It won't put smoke back in her mouth...
Zh: 解开你的小填字游戏？完成你的任务，把名字从你的清单上划去？想要变成某种世界的探测器……这样是不会*变好*的。她的嘴里也不会再次吐出香烟……

En: Beep-beep-beep! The alarm is ringing, Harry. The disco circus goes on and on! You barely slept three hours last night.
Zh: 哔哔哔！闹钟响了，哈里。迪斯科马戏团还在继续！昨晚你只勉强睡了三个小时。

En: You can do it. It's nothing. Do it for the city. Go.
Zh: 你可以做到的。这不算什么。就当是为了这座城市。去吧。

En: Do it for the wind.
Zh: 为了风而做。

En: Do it for the picture puzzle. Put it all together. Solve the world. One conversation at a time.
Zh: 为了拼图而做吧。把它全部拼在一起。解开这个世界的谜题。一次一个会话。

En: [Open your eyes.]
Zh: [睁开双眼。]

En: Feel the pillow under your cheek.
Zh: 感觉面颊下的枕头。

En: Why?
Zh: 为什么？

En: Coz only love can break your heart...
Zh: 因为只有爱情才能让你心碎……

En: I can't give up. I have to keep going, for Revachol... [Pursue thought.]
Zh: 我不能放弃，为了瑞瓦肖，我必须继续下去……[追随思维。]

En: I'm building communism for all. This time we won't fail... [Pursue thought.]
Zh: 我在为大家建立康米主义。这一次我们不会失败……[追随思维。]

En: I'm just looking out for my economic self-interest... [Pursue thought.]
Zh: 我只是在考虑我的经济利益……[追随思维。]

En: We're making progress. Measured, steady progress... [Pursue thought.]
Zh: 我们正在取得进步。平稳的进步……[追随思维。]

En: There he goes again. He's a real political animal, our Harry. He still doesn't see that it's the world that's changing *him*...
Zh: 他又来了，我们的哈里可真是只政坛野兽。他还是没明白，其实是这个世界在改变*他*……

En: For the working class.
Zh: 为了工人阶级。

En: For the greater good.
Zh: 为了更伟大的利益。

En: For the money, baby.
Zh: 为了钱和女人。

En: For Revachol. Always and only Revachol.
Zh: 为了瑞瓦肖，永远只为了瑞瓦肖。

En: Forget politics. I'll never sleep if I keep on like this.
Zh: 忘掉政治吧，再这么下去我就永远别想睡觉了。

En: Are you sure? You could be closing the door on a brilliant and *special* future for yourself.
Zh: 你确定吗？你也许关上了一扇通往美好又*特别*的未来之门。

En: You're right. It's time to get political.
Zh: 你说得对，该谈谈政治了！

En: Yes, I'm sure. I am very boring and *apolitical* and sleepy. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 是的，我确定。我觉得很无聊，我*不关心政治*，而且很困。[忽略思维。]

En: He's got no idea what he's in for.
Zh: 他根本不知道自己在做什么。

En: I knew you couldn't resist. So now you're gonna change the world, but how?
Zh: 我就知道你无法抗拒。所以，你现在要去改变世界了，可是该怎么做呢？

En: Did you hear that? He's renouncing politics. He's *strictly business* now.
Zh: 你难道没听见吗？他不想谈政治的事情。他现在有*正事*要做。

En: Just another thoughtless vessel ploughing the grey seas of the everyday.
Zh: 不过又是一艘每天在灰色海洋中耕耘的，没有思想的小船。

En: Great. This is gonna be really chill.
Zh: 很好。这下真的会变冷了。

En: Dark shore, my ass. I know what this is.
Zh: 黑暗海岸个鬼啊。我知道这是什么。

En: Yeah-yeah, just let me sleep...
Zh: 是啊，是啊，还是让我安心睡觉吧……

En: This bastard isn't even listening to you!
Zh: 这个卑鄙小人根本没在听你说话！

En: I don't care. That doesn't scare me.
Zh: 我不在乎。这样吓不到我。

En: Shut up, I just want to sleep.
Zh: 闭嘴，我只想睡觉。

En: Hear that? You were *naive* to think he's afraid of his bloodied hands, soul brother. Oh no, I see inside his amygdala and his hippocampus. The thing he's *really* scared of...
Zh: 听见了吗？你太*天真*了，居然以为他会害怕沾满血腥的双手，我的兄弟。哦不，我能看穿他的杏仁核，还有海马体。看穿他*真正*害怕的东西……

En: Okay, so I'm a murderer and that's *bad*.
Zh: 好吧，所以我是个杀人犯，这可*不妙*啊。

En: ...is much, *much* worse than that.
Zh: ……要比那个还要更加、*更加*糟糕。

En: Hear that? He doesn't even flinch. Ice-man doesn't care about killing people. That's *nothing* to him. Black water under the bridge. The thing he's *really* scared of...
Zh: 听见了吗？他甚至都没有退缩。冰人不在乎杀人。对于他来说，这根本*不算什么*。桥下流淌的黑水。他*真正*害怕的东西……

En: Hear that? Ice-man wants to sleep, he doesn't care about killing people. That's *nothing* to him. Black water under the bridge. The thing he's *really* scared of...
Zh: 听见了吗？冰人想睡觉，他不在乎杀人。对于他来说，这根本*不算什么*。桥下流淌的黑水。他*真正*害怕的东西……

En: We're trying to help you. All these processes -- these tortures, voices and tremors -- are all just *distractions*. Flares and countermeasures. To keep you from the *last dream*. The worst of them all.
Zh: 我们是想帮你。所有这些过程——所有这些折磨、声音和颤抖——都只是*干扰*。燃烧弹和应对策略。让你远离*最后的梦境*。也是最糟糕的那一个。

En: Her face forms in summertime...
Zh: 她的面容在夏日中渐渐成形……

En: The last dream will be total annihilation. Cinders peeling off the fuselage. We won't be there to help you anymore, Harry. We will be dormant. You will be naked and alone.
Zh: 最后的梦境将会是完全的湮灭。灰烬从机身上剥落。那时我们就帮不了你了，哈里。我们会陷入休眠。你将会孤身一人，一丝不挂。

En: Oh, but you *will*. You're already *going* there. Slipping. How long can we keep you from the precipice? *One* more dream? Two max, baby. Then it's...
Zh: 哦，但是你*会*的。你正在*去往*那个方向。不停滑落。我们还能让你远离悬崖多久？再有*一个*梦境？最多两个，宝贝。然后就是……

En: Doesn't sound like it will be okay.
Zh: 听上去好像不太好的样子。

En: Why are you doing this? I just want to sleep. I can almost see the dark.
Zh: 你为什么要这么做？我只想睡觉。我几乎就快看见黑暗了。

En: What is it?
Zh: 这是什么？

En: Don't tell him, sister. It's too bad.
Zh: 别告诉他，姐妹。这太糟糕了。

En: The... last dream?
Zh: 最后的……梦境？

En: And the air will smell of apricots...
Zh: 而且空气也会充满杏子的味道……

En: I don't *want to* anymore. I don't want to think either one of those things.
Zh: 我*不想*要了。我不想再去想任何事情。

En: ...in hell and ancient sadness, brother. Ten thousand years later -- in front of the video rental. There is a warm breath on your face again. Everything is *okay* again.
Zh: ……在地狱和远古的悲伤里，兄弟。一万年后——在录像带租赁店前方。你的脸上又有了温暖的气息。一切都会再次*变好*的。

En: Your eyelids flutter open for a moment. When you close them again, you sense the light of the room around you -- you're back. In two seconds the alarm will ring.
Zh: 你的眼皮稍微张开了一会儿。当你再次闭紧它们的时候，你感觉周围的房间有一丝光亮——你回来了。两秒钟之后，闹钟将会响起。

En: Everything is *so* okay.
Zh: 一切都*那么*的好。

En: Of hell and ancient sadness, brother. Ten thousand years later -- in front of the video rental. There is a warm breath on your face again. Everything is *okay* again.
Zh: 在地狱和远古的悲伤里，兄弟。一万年后——在录像带租赁店前方。你的脸上又有了温暖的气息。一切都会再次*变好*的。

En: I can't wait. I can't wait...
Zh: 我等不及。我等不及了……

En: They're right. This is their function. To keep you from *it*.
Zh: 他们说得对。这是他们的作用。让你远离*它*。

En: The last thought in your head before waking is: you need to go to the church...
Zh: 醒来之前，你脑海里的最后一个想法是：你需要去教堂……

En: The last thought in your head before waking is: maybe you shouldn't have seen that stained glass window? In the church....
Zh: 醒来之前，你脑海里的最后一个想法是：也许你不应该看到那些彩色玻璃窗？在教堂里……

En: Like a deftly cast fishing net, sleep pulls you out of the world and into its dark shore. The rough mesh chafes, then, tightening around you, it digs into your brain.
Zh: 就像一张熟练抛洒出的渔网，睡眠将你拉出这个世界，抛在黑暗的海岸上。粗糙的网眼擦痛了你的皮肤，然后紧紧将你困住，深深侵入你的脑海。

En: How've things been going for you out there? Helped anyone lately? Saved anyone lately? *Murdered* anyone lately?
Zh: 你在外面情况怎么样？最近有帮过什么人吗？救过人命吗？最近有*谋杀*什么人吗？

En: Because, you know, you *are* a murderer. A disco music listening psycho-killer who offs poor people -- and then *forgets* about it.
Zh: 因为，你知道的，你*是*一个杀人犯。一个喜欢迪斯科音乐的变态杀人犯，专门对穷苦的人们下手——然后把一切全部*遗忘*。

En: [Open your eyes.]
Zh: [睁开双眼。]

En: The door is locked. Lieutenant Kitsuragi resides inside.
Zh: 门上锁了。曷城警督住在里面。

En: He went with the 'Furies'. Perhaps the internal strife it implies was not so off after all? Or perhaps to honour your wishes? Or for some other reason. Hard to say...
Zh: 他带着*愤怒*一起去的。也许这意味着内讧并不真的很严重？或者是为了满足你的愿望？又或者还有什么其他原因。这很难说……

En: Look, Cuno, Lieutenant Kitsuragi's notes.
Zh: “看，坤诺，是曷城警督的笔记。”

En: The boy picks up the notes and shuffles through some of the case names: "'The Child', 'Dom's Unfinished', 'Dom's Unfinished 2', 'The Man With the Hole in His Head'... Boring ass shit," he concludes.
Zh: 男孩捡起笔记，敷衍地翻看着案件名：“‘小孩’，‘DOM未完成’，‘DOM未完成2’，‘头上有洞的男子’……都是些无聊的屁话，”他总结道。

En: Oh... 'Motorcycle Emptiness' -- that's a cool case. Cuno can solve that shit for the bino.
Zh: “哦……‘空虚摩托’——这案子挺酷的。坤诺可以帮那个四眼解决这个案子。”

En: Don't call him a *bino*.
Zh: “别叫他*四眼*。”

En: Yeah, Kim is such a binoclard.
Zh: “是啊，金确实是个四眼仔。”

En: Pig... he says with a frown. "It's cool for Cuno to rip on the 'clard, but he took a bullet for you. You gonna shitmouth Cuno too if he falls in battle?"
Zh: “猪头……”他皱着眉头说道。“对于坤诺来说，撕掉这些破玩意挺酷的，不过他替你挨了一颗子弹。如果坤诺在战场上倒下了，你也会这么嘴贱的说坤诺吗？”

En: The boy hesitates for a moment, then nods. "No one tells Cuno what to call something, but the bino was alright in Cuno's book." He taps his chest solemnly. "Cuno's pig."
Zh: 男孩犹豫了一下，然后点点头。“没人能告诉坤诺该怎么说，但是在坤诺的小本本里，四眼没什么问题。”他庄重地拍了拍胸脯。“坤诺是猪头。”

En: It just good-humoured banter among friends.
Zh: “这只是朋友间善意的玩笑罢了。”

En: I call it like I see it, Cuno.
Zh: “我看到什么就叫什么，坤诺。”

En: You're right, I shouldn't call him that.
Zh: “你说得对，我不应该这么叫他。”

En: He nods approvingly. "Now, let's get a move on, pig. Cuno's itching to crack this case."
Zh: 他赞同地点点头。“现在我们该继续了，猪头。坤诺已经等不及要解决这个案子了。”

En: That's cold, Pig. Sub-zero. Cuno ain't like that. Cuno's got heart. He looks at the notes. "You're done with these or...?"
Zh: “太让人寒心了，猪头。零度以下。坤诺不喜欢这样。坤诺有心的。”他看着笔记。“这个你已经用完了吧，还是……”

En: For you, maybe, he replies seriously. "But take it from the Cunn: Binos don't always get that. They get their feelings hurt. Cuno doesn't want this for your pal. He's alright in Cuno's book."
Zh: “对于你来说，也许吧，”他认真地回答到。“但是相信坤诺的话：四眼仔不总是这样的。他们的感情也会受到伤害。坤诺不想让你的兄弟受伤害。在坤诺的小本本里，他是不错的。”

En: He's right, you know? The lieutenant probably doesn't enjoy being called a binoclard -- the four-eyed dork.
Zh: 你知道他是对的。警督也许不喜欢别人叫他四眼仔。

En: These papers bear the stamp of the RCM. They appear to be fragments of the lieutenant's paperwork, half-finished. You make out notes on this -- and other recent cases.
Zh: 这些文件上盖有RCM的印章。看上去像是警督工作报告的片段，只完成了一部分。你认出了这起案件——和最近其他案件的笔记。

En: I had Garte open the door to your room. He closes the notes. "You were running a low bacterial fever the first night."
Zh: “我让加尔特把连通你房间的门打开了。”他合上笔记。“第一晚你有些细菌性感染引发的低烧。”

En: Thank you for keeping this... thing alive a little longer. (Point to yourself.)
Zh: “谢谢你……让这家伙能活的再久一点。”（指指自己。）

En: I'm such a burden. I should just fuck off...
Zh: “我真是个负担。我应该直接死掉的……”

En: I saw... apocalyptic visions. Of the darkness... behind darkness... *behind* darkness...
Zh: “我看见……末日的景象。黑暗的景象……就在黑暗之后……黑暗*之后*……”

En: What has he written -- on *this* case?
Zh: 关于*这起*案子——他都写了些什么？

En: What about the other cases? What do we have here...
Zh: 那其他案子呢？让我看看……

En: [Close the notes.]
Zh: [合上笔记。]

En: Very little. This is a daily write-up. He's just started copying notes from his notebook, preparing them for filing. The case appears to be named, however.
Zh: 很少。这是每天的总结。他只是誊写了一些笔记，打算稍后再归档。不过，他好像给这起案子起了个名字。

En: What is the name?
Zh: 什么名字？

En: HDB41-0803.1300 (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
HDB41-0803.1300 (THE HANGED MAN)
HDB41-0803.1111 (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
HDB41-0803.1111 (THE HANGED MAN)
HDB41-0803.1015 (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
HDB41-0803.1015 (THE HANGED MAN)
HDB41-0803 (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
Zh: HDB41-0803（镜中复仇女神）

En: HDB41-0803 (THE HANGED MAN)
KK57-0803-0815 (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
KK57-0803-0815 (THE HANGED MAN)
KK57-0803-0815  (THE FURIES ARE AT HOME IN THE MIRROR)
KK57-0803-0815 (THE HANGED MAN)

Twenty-eight kilometres to the northeast, in the infirmary of Precinct 57, Lieutenant Kim 'Pinball' Kitsuragi rests under a heart monitor. A triage sign coloured yellow hangs from his injury record -- safe, it means. He coughs, propped up against the pillow.
Zh: 东北方28公里处，在57辖区警局的医务室里，警督金·*弹球*·曷城正躺在心脏监护仪下休息。他的工伤记录上挂着一个黄色的检伤分类标签——意思是，无生命危险。他靠在枕头上，有些咳嗽。

En: This year, you can see references to: THE CHILD, DOM'S UNFINISHED; DOM'S UNFINISHED 2, MOTORCYCLE EMPTINESS, and THE MAN WITH THE HOLE IN HIS HEAD.
Zh: “今年能看到的参考有：孩子；DOM未完成；DOM未完成2；空虚摩托以及头上有洞的男子。”

En: Anything more?
Zh: 还有更多的吗？

En: Half a dozen stolen property cases titled CROSSWORD PUZZLES 2-2000.
Zh: 有六起失窃案，名字都叫填字游戏2-2000。

En: These are fragments of the lieutenant's paperwork, left unfinished. Notes on this and other recent cases.
Zh: 这些是警督工作报告的片段，还没有完成。还有关于这起案子和最近其他案子的笔记。

En: I am sure neither of us feels solid enough to keep loitering in this room -- let's go.
Zh: “我很肯定，如果继续待在这个房间我们都不会觉得太安全——还是走吧。”

En: Not this again... you pull your weight, okay? He waves you off. "Let's go."
Zh: “别又来一次……你尽好自己的本分就行，行吗？”他朝你挥挥手。“我们走吧。”

En: It would have been easy were it not for my concussion... We both got lucky, considering the odds we faced. There's a pause. "Let's go?"
Zh: “如果不是因为脑震荡，应该会容易很多……考虑到我们面临的可能性，其实挺幸运的。”他停顿了一下。“我们走吧？”

En: ... behind darkness, I get it. Let's go.
Zh: “……黑暗之后，我明白了。我们走吧。”

En: I thought I was dead for a moment.
Zh: “有那么一会儿，我还以为自己死了呢。”

En: Back there, on the plaza? I think you very nearly had another heart attack. Alcoholism has damaged you more than bullets have... There's a small pause. "We should go."
Zh: “在广场上的时候吗？我觉得你差点又要心脏病发作了。酗酒对你造成的伤害比子弹更严重……”他短暂地停顿了一下。“我们该走了。”

En: Back there, on the plaza? I think you very nearly had a heart attack. Alcoholism has damaged you more than bullets have... There's a small pause. "We should go."
Zh: “在广场上的时候吗？我觉得你差点要心脏病发作了。酗酒对你造成的伤害比子弹更严重……”他短暂地停顿了一下。“我们该走了。”

En: Why are you here? asks the man as the cough fit resides. His eyes are black and moist.
Zh: “你为什么在这里？”男人咳嗽着问到。他的眼睛深邃而湿润。

En: To inquire about the Lieutenant-Yefreitor, sir. I am his partner, says Satellite-Officer Jean Vicquemare, standing in the doorway.
Zh: “来打听荣誉警督，先生。我是他的搭档，”随迁警官让·维克玛站在门口。

En: Then why are you wasting time here? coughs Kim. "He's out there. In Martinaise. Unsupervised, *without cover*. You need to get there..." His cough gets the best of him, he grabs a glass.
Zh: “那你为什么还要在这里浪费时间？”金咳嗽着。“他在外面。在马丁内斯。没人看着他，也*没有任何掩护*。你得过去……”他咳得厉害，抓起一只玻璃杯。

En: On his right hand side -- a little blue notebook. Open at case notes...
Zh: 在他的右手边——是一个蓝色的小笔记本。案件调查笔记……

En: Yes, he replies. "The joke wasn't funny any more. I took it off."
A smoke most likely.
Zh: 很可能是烟。

En: A man of his word, this killer of killers.
Zh: 一个信守自己诺言的男人，专杀杀人犯的杀手。

En: A smoke most likely.
Zh: 很可能是烟。

En: This is not the first person to die in his place. He goes on.
Zh: 这不是第一个代替他死的人。他还会继续。

En: Thank you.
Zh: 谢谢你。

En: Thank you. Although...
Zh: 谢谢你。不过……

En: That's right.
Zh: 没事的。

En: He may have some idea -- but he's not gonna get into it with you.
Zh: 他也许有些想法——但他不会跟大人您说的。

En: Actually, you *can*. You can even remove a fractured bullet, it seems...
Zh: 其实，你*可以*的。似乎，你甚至可以取出一颗断裂的子弹……

En: Wait. You've checked? She's really...
Zh: “等等。你检查过了？她真的……”

En: You think she could.... be of more use to us?
Zh: “你觉得她……还对我们有用处吗？”

En: Wait! *Klaasje* is gone too?
Zh: “等等！*卡拉洁*也走了？”

En: Garte confirmed she left 20 minutes prior to the tribunal showing up.
Zh: “加尔特确认在那群判官出现20分钟前，她就已经离开了。”

En: Oh yes, he nods. "She left 20 minutes prior to the tribunal showing up. I asked Mr. Garte."
Zh: “是的，”他点点头。“她在那群判官出现的20分钟前就已经离开了。我问过加尔特先生了。”

En: Who would have figured?
Zh: 谁能想到呢？

En: Okay, so once more -- Klaasje has *escaped*?
Zh: “好吧，所以卡拉洁——又一次*逃跑*了？”

En: Absolutely, he nods. "There's no other way to go about it. We screwed up."
Zh: “没错，”他点点头。“没有别的办法。我们搞砸了。”

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: A nod.
Zh: 他点头示意。

En: Another look at the window perhaps -- the one he was shot through? I don't know... I can't think of anything better.
Zh: “也许可以再看看窗户？——就是子弹射进来的那一扇。我不知道……我也想不出更好的主意了。”

En: That's between you and them, he thinks.
Zh: 这是你和他们之间的事，他想到。

En: Can you? You're pretty sure you can't.
Zh: 你可以吗？你很肯定自己做不到。

En: That does make (some) sense.
Zh: 这确实有（一些）道理。

En: Every piece of garbage in the city is not connected to the case. You don't have to keep *everything*.
Zh: “这个城市的每一个垃圾都与这个案子无关。你没必要留着*所有东西*的。”

En: Plus one. Ruby.
Zh: 再加一个。露比。

En: See? There's that. You can do ballistics!
Zh: 看见没？还有那个。你可以做弹道测试！

En: It's morning outside, you think.
Zh: 外面已经是早上了，你想到。

En: The lieutenant did mention doing more ballistics...
Zh: 警督的确提到了追加弹道测试的事……

En: A man and a woman sit in the front seat of an armoured motor carriage. The woman is driving, the man lights a cigarette. Jean Vicquemare is his name, the asphalt vanishes under the wheels of the machine. Ahead, harbour cranes rise to the sky...
Zh: 一对男女坐在一辆装甲車的前排。女人正在开車，男人点燃一支烟。他的名字叫让·维克玛，沥青在机器的轮子下消失。前方，港口的起重机直冲云霄……

En: Back to that shithole, he says.
Zh: “又回到那个鬼地方了，”他说道。

En: Turns out it was a bad idea not to arrest her, but... He shrugs. "Maybe it was a *good deed* that will pay off in heaven."
Zh: “到最后不逮捕她反而是个坏主意……”他耸耸肩。“也许这是一件*好事*，会在天堂里得到回报。”

En: By the way, the lieutenant does not actually believe you will be spiritually reimbursed for letting her escape. You just have to live with it.
Zh: 顺便说一句，警督并不是真的相信让她逃跑会让你在精神上得到补偿。你只能选择接受。

En: He's made his peace with it. He's had the time to do so.
Zh: 他与自己讲和了。他有时间这么做。

En: Four: Glen, Theo, Shanky, and Angus. The fat one, he... took a lot of bullets. There's a pause.
Zh: “四个：格伦，特奥，尚克还有安格斯。那个胖子，他……中了很多枪。”他停顿了一下。

En: Six: Glen, Theo, Shanky, Angus. The fat one, he... took a lot of bullets. There's a pause. "And Titus."
Zh: “六个：格伦，特奥，尚克，安格斯。那个胖子，他……中了很多枪。”他停顿了一下。“还有提图斯。”

En: Five: Glen, Theo, Shanky, Angus. The fat one, he... took a lot of bullets. There's a pause. "And Titus."
Zh: “四个：格伦，特奥，尚克，安格斯。那个胖子，他……中了很多枪。”他停顿了一下。“还有提图斯。”

En: Five: Glen, Theo, Shanky, and Angus, the fat one, he... took a lot of bullets. There's a pause.
Zh: “五个：格伦，特奥，尚克和安格斯，还有那个胖子，他……中了很多枪。”他停顿了一下。

En: I was not able to kill him -- as I should have. Krenel took him... the lieutenant states again. "A stray bullet killed de Paule, though. And that's what happened."
Zh: “我没能杀了他——我应该这么做的。科奈尔干掉了他……”警督再次声明到，“不过，一颗流弹杀死了波勒。事情就是这样。”

En: I killed her, the lieutenant repeats himself. "And that's what happened."
Zh: “我杀了她，”警督重复到。“事情就是这样。”

En: Nod.
Zh: 点点头。

En: The room... it's clean.
Zh: “这个房间……很干净。”

En: What did you say... sunrise...
Zh: “你说什么……日出……”

En: What... happened?
Zh: “发生……什么事了？”

En: Ouch.
Zh: “好痛。”

En: It's not *ouch* time yet. You just got a *drouamine* pill an hour ago. Wait until it wears off.
Zh: “现在还不到说*好痛*的时候。你一小时前刚吃了一片*多巴宁*。等药效过了再说。”

En: Mr. Garte cleaned it. It took him an entire day.
Zh: “加尔特先生清理过了。花了他一整天时间。”

En: Sunrise, Parabellum. Sunrise, Prepare-for-War. It's an old revolutionary saying.
Zh: “日出帕拉贝伦。太阳升起，准备战斗。这是一句古老的革命宣言。”

En: Drouamine. Then it's not *that* bad. Neither surgical, nor organ-damage bad. But still under-the-counter bad.
Zh: 多巴宁。看样子不是*那种*糟糕。不是需要手术，也不是器官损伤，而是隐隐作痛。

En: Is it... war today?
Zh: “难道……今天要打仗了？”

En: How long have I been out?
Zh: “我昏迷多久了？”

En: Two days. In and out -- you've been up enough to take drouamine and curse. And drink water.
Zh: “两天。睡睡醒醒——有时候会起来吃点多巴宁，然后咒骂一番。还有喝水。”

En: The gates of the harbour are boarded up. The streets are a little more empty. Apocalyptic violence is yet to erupt, I am relieved to say. He looks out the window.
Zh: 他看向窗外。“港口大门被封住了。街上又空旷了一些。我可以放心地说，严重的暴动还没有爆发。”

En: I think we may have held it off -- for now. He unzips his bomber jacket. "Barely."
Zh: “我觉得我们可能让它推迟了一些——不过只是暂时的。”他拉开飞行员夹克。“很勉强。”

En: A pity.
Zh: “很遗憾。”

En: Good.
Zh: “很好。”

En: Ouch.
Zh: “好痛。”

En: Uhuh, he nods. "I see the drouamine is working."
Zh: “嗯，”他点点有。“看来多巴宁起作用了。”

En: Pity?
Zh: “遗憾？”

En: I seriously want this... social order to collapse now.
Zh: “我真的很希望这个……社会秩序现在就崩溃。”

En: This is the end and I am its trumpeter, Kim. The quicker we get it done the better.
Zh: “末日已经来临，而我就是吹响末日号角的那个人，金。我们动作越快越好。”

En: Pity all the whores and traitors haven't been washed away! It's like I suffer... (cough) but for what?
Zh: “很遗憾，那些贱人和叛徒还没有被大水冲走！我好像有点难受……（咳咳）是怎么一回事呢？”

En: You misunderstand me. (cough) I meant that in a... *disco* way.
Zh: “你误会我了。（咳咳）我的意思是……比较*迪斯科*的方式。”

En: I see the drouamine is working.
Zh: “我看多巴宁像是起作用了。”

En: The whores, yes. That's good to hear.
Zh: “那些贱人，是啊。很高兴听到你这么说。”

En: Cool.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Rhetorical flare. He does not actually welcome the return of the whores.
Zh: 修辞恶化。他并不是真心欢迎那些贱人的回归。

En: Nothing. I take it back.
Zh: “没什么。我收回。”

En: No need to take it back, lieutenant-yefreitor. You wanted things to go South outside -- that's okay, we all do from time to time. They haven't, though. Yet.
Zh: “不用收回，荣誉警督。你希望外面的情况变坏——这没什么，我们偶尔都会这样。不过并没有。暂时没有。”

En: No need, officer. You wanted things to go South outside -- that's okay, we all do from time to time. They haven't, though. Yet.
Zh: “没必要的，警官。你希望外面的情况变坏——这没什么，我们偶尔都会这样。不过并没有。暂时没有。”

En: Yes. We have also completely failed. But that's okay.
Zh: “是的。我们也完全失败了。不过这没关系。”

En: That's right. He nods in agreement. "Ouch, indeed."
Zh: “没错。”他点头赞同。“确实很痛。”

En: Isn't that written on your...
Zh: 那不是写在你……

En: My gun. It's engraved on it.
Zh: “我的枪。它就刻在我的枪上。”

En: It served you well.
Zh: “它为你尽忠职守。”

En: Cops like it.
Zh: “警察很喜欢它。”

En: How bad am I hurt?
Zh: “我伤的有多重？”

En: What happened? You shot the major in the face. A firefight ensued.
Zh: “发生什么事了？你朝少校脸上开了一枪。接着就是一场交火。”

En: As retaliation, their rifleman tried shooting you. He missed -- or you dodged...
Zh: “作为报复，他们的步枪手也想朝你开枪。他没打中——或者是你躲开了……”

En: Is he dead?
Zh: “他死了吗？”

En: What... happened then?
Zh: “那……之后呢？”

En: Very. He died in the hospital.
Zh: “死透了。他死在医院了。”

En: Yes.
Zh: “是的。”

En: You're a real killer, Harry.
Zh: 你是个真正的杀人犯，哈里。

En: A bloodstained killer.
Zh: 一个沾满鲜血的杀人犯。

En: I'm a killer...
Zh: “我是个杀人犯……”

En: Swallow...
Zh: 吞口水……

En: You're an officer of the RCM. He continues without waiting for a reply...
Zh: “你是一名RCM警官。”他没有等待你的回复，自顾自地说道……

En: Then I shot and wounded him while Glen took a bullet in the spine. He nods. "It was meant for me. Glen did not survive." There's a pause.
Zh: 他点点头。“然后我开枪打伤了他，格伦的脊柱中了一枪。本来是冲着我来的。格伦没能挺过来。”他停顿了一下。

En: Titus, Fat Angus, and Theo charged. Angus and Theo died before they made it to intensive care, Titus died in the hospital. Yesterday. Alain and the young musician, I forget his name... They're all that's left.
Zh: “提图斯、胖子安格斯和特奥试图突围。安格斯和特奥没来得及送进重症监护室就死了，提图斯死在了医院里，就在昨天。阿兰，还有那个音乐家，我忘记他的名字了……只剩下他们两个活了下来。”

En: Titus, Fat Angus, and Theo charged. Angus and Theo did not make it. They both died before they made it to intensive care. Titus survives. So do Alain and the musician, I forget his name...
Zh: “提图斯、胖子安格斯和特奥试图突围。安格斯和特奥都没能活下来。他们还没来得及送进重症监护室就死了。提图斯还活着。阿兰，还有那个音乐家也活着，我忘记他的名字了……”

En: I dodged.
Zh: “我闪开了。”

En: Then what?
Zh: “然后呢？”

En: You were bleeding out by then. I think you said something about your wife. And you warned me. I was able to disarm one of them, de Paule, before she got the jump on me.
Zh: “那时候你血流不止。我好像听到你说了些关于你妻子的话。然后你警告了我，我抢在波勒动手之前缴了她的武器。”

En: You were bleeding out by then. I think you said that no one wants to party with you. And you warned me. I was able to disarm one of them, de Paule, before she got the jump on me.
Zh: “那时候你血流不止。我好像听见你说什么没人想跟你一起派对。然后你警告了我，我抢在波勒动手之前缴了她的武器。”

En: You were bleeding out by then. I think you said you lied about being an amnesiac. And you warned me. I was able to disarm one of them, de Paule, before she got the jump on me.
Zh: “那时候你血流不止。我好像听见你说自己失忆是假装的。然后你警告了我，我抢在波勒动手之前缴了她的武器。”

En: You were bleeding out, you said something, I don't know what... He thinks. "And you warned me. I was able to disarm officer de Paule before she got the jump on me."
Zh: “你大出血，说了些什么，我不知道是什么……”他想了想。“你警告了我。我抢在波勒动手之前缴了她的武器。”

En: I was not able to kill him -- as I should have. Krenel took him... The lieutenant takes a cigarette from his coat pocket and lights it. A bitter smell fills the room. "A stray bullet killed de Paule, though. And that's what happened."
Zh: “我没能杀了他——我应该这么做的。科奈尔干掉了他……”警督从大衣口袋里掏出一支烟，点燃了它。一股苦涩的味道充满整个房间。“不过，一颗流弹杀死了波勒。事情就是这样。”

En: I killed her. The lieutenant takes a cigarette from his coat pocket and lights it. A bitter smell fills the room. "And that's what happened."
Zh: “我杀了她。”警督从大衣口袋里掏出一支烟，点燃了它。一股苦涩的味道充满整个房间。“事情就是这样。”

En: I shot and wounded him. While Glen took a bullet in the spine. It was meant for me -- he did not survive. There's a pause.
Zh: “我击伤了他。与此同时格伦的脊柱中了一枪。那枪原本是冲着我开的——他没能活下来。”他停顿了一下。

En: I thought you only smoked one a day.
Zh: “我以为你一天只抽一根烟的。”

En: And they're dead... the rest of the mercenaries?
Zh: “他们死了……那其他雇佣兵呢？”

En: And they're all dead, all three... of the contractors?
Zh: “他们全都死了吗，那三个……雇佣兵？”

En: How many casualties... on the Union's side? Total?
Zh: “工会那边……伤亡情况怎么样？总共有多少？”

En: And that's... (Conclude.)
Zh: “然后呢……”（总结。）

En: This is the one.
Zh: “就是这一根。”

En: He nods. "Evrart had their bodies returned to Krenel for a funeral. The company is yet to retaliate."
Zh: 他点点头。“艾弗拉特把他们的尸体交还科奈尔举行葬礼。公司目前还没有反击。”

En: De Paule was the last to die. He nods. "Evrart had their bodies returned to Krenel for a funeral. The company is yet to retaliate."
Zh: 他点点头。“波勒是最后一个死的。艾弗拉特把他们的尸体交还科奈尔举行葬礼。公司目前还没有反击。”

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: Because we *deterred* them? Or Joyce did? Maybe the harbour -- in full lockdown -- is too costly a target. Or maybe... he breathes in the fumes, thinking.
Zh: “因为我们*阻止*了他们？或者是乔伊斯阻止的？也许将港口——现在已经全面封闭——作为目标的代价太大了。或者，也许……”他吸了一口烟，若有所思。

En: Maybe they are simply taking their time and will attack soon? I don't know.
Zh: “也许他们只是打算慢慢来，不久后就会发动袭击？我不知道。”

En: Four: Glen, Theo, Angus, the fat one, he... took a lot of bullets. There's a pause.
Zh: “四个：格伦，特奥，安格斯，那个胖子，他……中了很多枪。”他停顿了一下。

En: And Elizabeth too -- Elizabeth Beaufort was her name. The gardener.
Zh: “还有伊丽莎白——她的名字叫伊丽莎白·博福特，那个园丁。”

En: She did not make it?
Zh: “她没挺过来？”

En: No. She bled out before Evrart's surgeon could help her. Evrart sent his personal doctor but... He shakes his head. "A costly loss for the Union. She was being trained for leadership."
Zh: “没有。她失血过多，艾弗拉特的医生没能帮上她。艾弗拉特把私人医生都派出来了，不过……”他摇摇头。“工会付出了昂贵的代价。她本来是被训练成接班人。”

En: All. He nods.
Zh: “就这些。”他点点头。

En: An absolute disaster.
Zh: “一场绝对的灾难。”

En: It's a total shit show, Kim.
Zh: “这是一场彻头彻尾的灾难，金。”

En: Not *that* bad -- all things considered.
Zh: “也没*那么*糟糕——如果从整体来看的话。”

En: I don't see how it could have gone any better.
Zh: “我看不出还有更好的可能。”

En: Let's face it, officer -- and this is both of our fault... he says calmly -- without accusation. "It could have gone *a little* better. Seven people are dead."
Zh: “面对现实吧，警官——这都是我们的错……”他的声音很平静——没有谴责的意味。“本来情况可以*稍微*好一点。一共死了7个人。”

En: Let's face it, officer -- and this is both of our fault... he says calmly -- without accusation. "It could have gone *a little* better. Six people are dead."
Zh: “面对现实吧，警官——这都是我们的错……”他的声音很平静——没有谴责的意味。“本来情况可以*稍微*好一点。一共死了7个人。”

En: But what's done is done. The violence is cordoned off, the hornets did not get into the beehive. He rubs his swollen chin. "The worst scenario has not materialized -- yet."
Zh: “但是过去的事都过去了。暴动被封锁隔离，大黄蜂没有归巢。”他揉了揉肿胀的下巴。“最糟糕的情节没有上演——暂时没有。”

En: But what's done is done. The violence is cordoned off, the mercenary tribunal is neutralized. The worst scenario has not materialized -- yet.
Zh: “但过去的事都过去了。暴动被封锁隔离，雇佣兵宣判撤销了。最糟糕的情节没有上演——暂时没有。”

En: Oh no, officer, he says calmly -- without accusation. "It's pretty bad. Seven people are dead."
Zh: “不，哈里，”他的声音很平静——没有谴责的意味。“真的挺糟糕的。一共死了6个人。”

En: Oh no, Harry, he says calmly -- without accusation. "It's pretty bad. Seven people are dead."
Zh: “不，哈里，”他的声音很平静——没有谴责的意味。“真的挺糟糕的。一共死了6个人。”

En: Oh no, officer, he says calmly -- without accusation. "It's pretty bad. Six people are dead."
Zh: “不，警官，”他的声音很平静——没有谴责的意味。“真的挺糟糕的。一共死了7个人。”

En: Yes, officer, he says calmly. "Seven people are dead. It's not a success."
Zh: “是的，警官，”他的声音很平静。“死了6个人。算不上是成功。”

En: Yes, officer, he says calmly. "Six people are dead. It's not a success."
Zh: “是的，警官，”他的声音很平静。“死了7个人。算不上是成功。”

En: He did not expect you both to survive once you stepped between those two armies.
Zh: 在你们选择介入两队纷争的时候，他就没指望你们两个都能幸存。

En: His smoking, his hunched back... you have it worse, but he took a real beating. That cigarette has *medicinal* purposes.
Zh: 他的香烟，佝偻的后背……你的情况更糟糕，但他也受了不少罪。那些香烟有*医疗*作用。

En: Eugene?
Zh: “尤金？”

En: Yes. He's still alive too.
Zh: “是的。他也活着。”
